clean_body: Lauren Boebert’s fellow extremists in Congress – and her corporate special interest donors – are panicking because in 2022, Adam Frisch came just 546 votes shy of defeating her. Hello, Did you see who gave Lauren Boebert’s campaign money? Jim Jordan. Matt Gaetz. And too many corporate PACs to list in just this one email. Lauren Boebert’s fellow extremists in Congress – and her corporate special interest donors – are panicking because in 2022, Adam Frisch came just 546 votes shy of defeating her. It was the closest race in the entire country. Now, Adam is running against Boebert again, and the first poll shows a TIED race! That’s why Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs are already attacking Adam and trying to smear him with lies. 2024 is the year we WILL send Lauren Boebert packing and restore some sanity to Washington. But if we’re going to win and stop Boebert’s angertainment circus, Adam is counting on grassroots donors like you to give now. clean_body: An update on the $370 million plot to try and sabotage us in the primary.| | | | | Friend, So far, disloyal Republicans (RINOs) have only PLEDGED to spend $370 MILLION on their plot to sabotage us in the primary. But that all changed at the July end-of-month fundraising deadline. Right before the deadline, a nefarious group of RINO globalists officially raised $78 million to begin turning that plot into a reality. They’ve shown that their $370 million plot is not just a threat. They are truly willing to spend more money than even George Soros to defeat us. This news came just as Biden’s weaponized Department of “Justice” issued yet another unlawful INDICTMENT of me as a completely innocent man. Friend, we’re being attacked from every side. RINOs. Democrats. Globalists. They’re all just one big UNIPARTY that’s united behind a common goal of stopping YOU from having power in your own country. That’s why RINOs are willing to spend MORE THAN GEORGE SOROS to try and take me down. Every dollar Republicans spend attacking me is a dollar given straight to the Biden campaign. The truth is: they know that and simply do not care. . . . . . Because, at the end of the day, they’d rather see Crooked Joe in the White House than a political outsider who puts the people of our country FIRST. These special interest globalists have made a fortune off of putting YOU dead last and selling out our nation to foreign countries like China. These RINOs love to call themselves defenders of liberty – and yet, they choose to side with a corrupt president who has once again weaponized the legal system in an attempt to JAIL his single biggest opponent for a lifetime. But fortunately for us, our movement is packed with over 74 MILLION patriots who will peacefully defend our God-given liberty and justice. Even a contribution of just $1 alongside your fellow patriots is enough to OUTRAISE these RINOs and ensure we prevail against the never-ending attacks from ALL sides. | | Thank you, Donald J. name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Do the M and F on Birth Certificates Still Mean Anything?
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Do You Think Girls & Boys Should Have Separate Sports?

Florida, Kansas,
Idaho and other states are passing laws to prevent trans dudes
from winning all the girls' trophies
at school. The left is lying about these laws, falsely calling
them "gender checks" and claiming that
teachers will abuse kids by examining their genitals.

What are they,
really? Kids have to bring their valid birth certificate to
school to play sports. If it says "M," they play boys'
sports. If it says "F," they play girls' sports. Period.

Should schools
protect girls' sports from transgenders who are really boys and
men?

VOTE NOW!

Take our national poll and let your
patriotic voice be heard!

DCDailyJournal.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

name: Faith and Liberty News
subject: “The Free Market is Dead”
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
| |
Dear fellow American, Time magazine published a story featuring the headline, “The Free Market is Dead: What Will Replace It?”

This is, of course, an exaggeration, but it makes clear the far-Left's goal-nothing less than a transformation of the world economy based on a rejection of economist Adam Smith's "invisible hand."

As the author writes, "We are on the cusp of a new era of broad-based prosperity in which our leaders are poised to more actively manage the American market."

Today's advocates of a "managed market" may call it by a new name-"The Great Reset"-but it is premised on an old and harmful idea.

What utopian ideologies like this one have in common is a misplaced faith in the rule of so-called experts and a corresponding disregard for the people's right to rule themselves. Taken to their logical conclusion, such ideologies can end only in **tyranny**.

The great British statesman Winston Churchill knew this, which led him to observe, "Nothing would be more fatal than for the government of states to get into the hands of the experts. Expert knowledge is limited knowledge: and the unlimited ignorance of the plain man who knows only what hurts is a safer guide, than any vigorous direction of a specialised character."

**In the fight to preserve our freedom, our greatest asset is education.** Americans who understand our country's founding principles and have a firm grasp of history are best prepared to resist the lure of utopian schemes.

**[That's why Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in our FREE MARKET SURVEY.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)**

Your answers will help us understand more clearly the views of mainstream Americans-not the so-called experts-concerning the importance of the free market system in our nation.

Please begin your survey below. Your answers will remain strictly confidential.

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/free-market-survey/](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._DuyTRoj2A)**

Thank you for your time and attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **_[Hillsdale College National Survey on the Free Market and Economic Liberty](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-rXbm2SYjdxnehdh0q1mA)_** **1\. Do you believe that the Constitution made it possible for America to become the freest and most prosperous nation in history?**
---
| | [ Yes](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._ho8XQ)
---
| | [No](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._wQ)
---
| | [Not Sure/No Opinion](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._WtFkSKhhbpxYdQ)
---
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMjE4LTg5Y2I4MDBjYjViNzQ3Mjc5NmI2M2FlN2IwYTg3NTc5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/ovm1gSCvvRi2QMtMhKy0Cw) to unsubscribe.
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2k96m16v0o1vrj3gmeadcu4arn89flo9krtitro_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0bbs3i7uj1ukcuafd2okl0evl6b59rvlaka8su0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znn81113risjqcc0r2tfjtjft8at4qo9p5fvd37o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

ICYMI News
---

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrfcgmqpfrh7918ot7mu50me669sd363hgvgtmq0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmpr7irdqcndlqvcpihp9gs9dm8ddvscb1v0o3a8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zajvttgaib84r7a28ulkcbif6v2ur0a4nk9rp7v8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpvvujrpni6crekanasa89ubvfeur67uoki8o88o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9v9hfc5dsi6kdtpj4dbasqqn6s3vi218u1uvqj8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc8018b4ese822ht5uu9m8qed1470iklhk7nr94g_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuema9h65dolicu80iv7bhdrommscue9tkbano68_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn83j0elqdbfvpni2f0ado60oonu54irp23lo41g_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0998f1qr8tt07d0j51tvauuc19eqr07bin0nr3g_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmdav2okha0e6idulbmjnnm36fjcbokefg0lt6l0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zal7amk5evp05geenqm3chobjl234d1pha06eh00_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztthqul5594f799dbhde8nejo4f8s7jcd142820g_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z35ahud6qhketjg312d6tv7v267herja667u46e8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z797ip8m3be7ccm509ebshmuthjdj6ke0il4bovg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmeeq94vha6e1r6ajs32udr2b331dhnn83esp470_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbqh70nd6tdt23ad35dg293cn3f85r7pt97q16n8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zat2j7ihkkt6ir5gnmpnn6unocp65901qrl017s8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zort6l1fq47ca9u2t213g6po0uvo38or2ir14h38_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgqeqn4hrju5ss46njq18pf5mnkksrvsauks6etg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p31ctimcpj246h22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgt3qr5hjudu3b6c7f4mq8ihr8f588u3u9qu7bt8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z162aa3ock249tl6qq72vlfhq3fegggmri481va8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi66o31c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Phil Kerpen
subject: AARP betrayed seniors. Help us fight back.
body:
Dear Friend,
I know that you are as disturbed as I am about the creeping government takeover of our healthcare system.
First, they forced Americans to buy government-approved health insurance under Obamacare.
Then under Biden’s so-called "Inflation Reduction Act," liberals forced drug companies to accept government-set pricing or face a 95% tax on their gross sales – with the savings diverted to green energy giveaways.
Both of these bills were finances with big Medicare cuts. **And no lobbying force has done more to enact these anti-senior policies than AARP.**
**That’s why I hope you will please**[**Click Here to Tell Congress that AARP Doesn't Represent Seniors!**](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxs0D32nSoUQPHRaMkCDnCwsPi_d-M8FEVQ_EJEvaPPSurUe1e_vu50VQlbDjVTFQOuNWLpas5t36IE3toKFNVDJ4e-H6gR0CFTuvQ1pxyopooBCEDCiEBe_XxY81_zPzQ_8lchaPSjS7dfxzjsW0zEbEsZapfSXsBPwZuCNynO5B_bnwjNk0IBH7UaMN5KGIZ7ntJqr3np-unWUXZR4xb4bUI-3nauVCf3_HUjozIndfm-yybsWF3eHc8JmKIA3W6v1nyOFcopPXZ7v0EvfrvG1yRuw_S4HWN2UuT7QdGZHGd_QnLb8wanLB3eDKd8ZdDriWIBOqZn2YU5Vo7PoPSazOP3sVfrZad7u02ezoKrwbsCPvN30euZJrXHZcLOffGccl7f80Do2tGVS62YYBWqqox1v98-BH8qLAQdl9aHv4apfkh8X0opAXtQklkSvSaZ3hcXxLeKC0O03rkhFkUPhLn7-B0AAP__BZuimw)
A recent bombshell report from Juniper Research reveals how the supposed "seniors organization" AARP is little more than a marketing scam for UnitedHealth – the largest health insurance company in America.
AARP sells UnitedHealth insurance exclusively in return for a 4.95% cut of every monthly premium – AARP’s corporate royalties net them over $1 BILLION a year.
[**Click Here to Tell Congress that AARP Doesn't Represent Seniors!**](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxs0D3WnCAYQOHVaMkBXoafwmKSifsAEUGRUWREZ_U5Sf3V91aP7YxUirl27AhXBKiUQrS-c0wTJRxoCUJjB5RypQzh2lIYtTNt6CimgCXmBICBQAQxQdXzRfpf_W_on48_DcM5TL7UkKY8bu9c0PBe29j5UrYGng3tG9qXvKAftn8R-qvEBl48DTAE94BxrMtckvssq7FzlflhshQbu5NnVw3hek8VPtG88xkShd1OdLZninuMJN1hMoM0BxlN9JeT5yL0fWrNsZfBHg7G5NcDg6zpAyrhYd4UHdM82MUniz1ZrjhPZd0DFGrOKKpcD38eAsehWrLga6--LPT4VmHl951geYhHVV-ViYGG8jH4Bl7Ld5XpKDPf8joL47_imM8z3ccuwOjJt2vHCSNKcNXmzm41xBgOLhqGp1WH-N-wdBfK940xRuB2jE5SmJXoxPVDGQqaUzYgKTc6ICeYBUR83f8GAAD___-PofE)
It is important to understand AARP’s blatant conflict of interest as they work to dupe seniors and members of Congress into believing that socialized medicine will _help_ them.
**The policies AARP advocates for would decimate our healthcare system – while enriching its big insurance partner and itself.**
AARP was taken to court over this blatant conflict of interest.
At trial, AARP defended itself by arguing that its relationship with its senior members "is not one of 'trust or confidence' that creates a fiduciary duty" and "does not 'transcend an ordinary business' relationship."
**When AARP says they have no responsibility to act with seniors' interests in mind — take them at their word.**

clean_body: Dear Friend, I know that you are as disturbed as I am about the creeping government takeover of our healthcare system. First, they forced Americans to buy government-approved health insurance under Obamacare. Then under Biden’s so-called "Inflation Reduction Act," liberals forced drug companies to accept government-set pricing or face a 95% tax on their gross sales – with the savings diverted to green energy giveaways. Both of these bills were finances with big Medicare cuts. And no lobbying force has done more to enact these anti-senior policies than AARP. That’s why I hope you will please A recent bombshell report from Juniper Research reveals how the supposed "seniors organization" AARP is little more than a marketing scam for UnitedHealth – the largest health insurance company in America. AARP sells UnitedHealth insurance exclusively in return for a 4.95% cut of every monthly premium – AARP’s corporate royalties net them over $1 BILLION a year. It is important to understand AARP’s blatant conflict of interest as they work to dupe seniors and members of Congress into believing that socialized medicine will help them. The policies AARP advocates for would decimate our healthcare system – while enriching its big insurance partner and itself. AARP was taken to court over this blatant conflict of interest. At trial, AARP defended itself by arguing that its relationship with its senior members "is not one of 'trust or confidence' that creates a fiduciary duty" and "does not 'transcend an ordinary business' relationship." When AARP says they have no responsibility to act with seniors' interests in mind — take them at their word. American Commitment and the Committee to Unleash Prosperity have launched a campaign to push back against socialized medicine by exposing AARP as a prop for Big Insurance. That’s why it’s so important you take a moment to so that we can get our message out as loud as possible. The future of America’s health care system may well depend on us unmasking AARP as a front group for UnitedHealth. Will you join me in taking this important stand against socialized medicine? Thanks for all you do, Phil Kerpen P.S. If you act today, we will also sign you up for a FREE subscription to the Committee to Unleash Prosperity's HOTLINE newsletter by famed economist Stephen Moore. Newt Gingrich calls it "brilliantly done and always informative-a remarkable achievement." / / MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the persons or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. End government purchases of Chinese tech that threatens our national security. 4. Stop the U.S. government’s collaboration with China on science and technology. 5. She’s putting in the hard work and laying the groundwork for victory. Will you please step up TODAY to help fuel Nikki’s campaign and send her to the White House? Thank you in advance. It was written by a proud Iowan, mother, wife, and business leader who said that Haley is proof that you can be principled and tough without losing yourself to the gutter. Be sure to read it for yourself! Read the op-ed here → I’m proud my daughter admires Nikki Haley. GRASSROOTS MOVEMENT UPDATE: As you know, we’re building a strong grassroots infrastructure in early voting states so we can win and get our country back on track. Nikki is traveling back to New Hampshire and Iowa THIS WEEK so she can talk with voters, get her message out, and continue to build momentum throughout the states. BUT, traveling and putting on events isn’t cheap. Which is why your support is so important, Peter! Before Nikki’s next event, I wanted to see if you could pitch in a generous gift of $7 or more to help our team cover some of these costs? - Cover transportations costs - Help cover lodging expenses - Rent sound equipment for town halls - Rent chairs for town hall guests CHIP IN TO HELP FUEL NIKKI’S CAMPAIGN It’s critical that Nikki continues traveling to battleground states so she reaches every American with her conservative message. She’s putting in the hard work and laying the groundwork for victory. Will you please step up TODAY to help fuel Nikki’s campaign and send her to the White House? Thank you in advance. Betsy Campaign Manager Nikki Haley for President NIKKI HALEY MERCHANDISE HIGHLIGHT: A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley this summer is with your very own Strong & Proud not Weak & Woke drink cooler ! All of our merchandise is made in America. ">Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your drink cooler today! > GET YOURS NOW! NIKKI HALEY’S OFFICIAL CAMPAIGN STORE: VISIT STORE → JOIN TEAM HALEY With Election Day more than a year out, you may be wondering: Does my donation today really make an impact? The answer is, unequivocally, YES! Grassroots support is what Nikki’s fight to save America is built on. In fact, grassroots conservatives like YOU are the reason Nikki has never lost an election before – from her run for the state legislature to governor. Your generous support today will allow Nikki and our team to host town halls, hold rallies, meet with voters, and spread her conservative message all around the country. We’re just getting started and would love to have you on Team Haley! ">So, if you can spare it, a donation of $1, $10, or ANY amount goes a long way to help Nikki reach more voters! >> P.S. If you don’t have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time toText NIKKI to 48324 and share this with 5 friends today! DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Fund, Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply.

name: Your America
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20844%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WCc3tl%2bz11HNxpzhinmI%2fA&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20955%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eMfdZ0hZbqkYSnrvbdxktw&sysid=1).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20956%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ftAGqlz2BuhNXxdCM%2bnHdA&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20957%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ODLkuoY1bPkTyJB4XH2J3g&sysid=1) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can’t just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION --to DO SOMETHING about it, while there’s still time to save our country. **

That is why I’m writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of “We the People”--before it’s too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20958%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DIMMh50UWUA5sbOzfgPffQ&sysid=1)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8110%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=gTkYXs59uOehFe6R7JmMmg&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20959%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4ego6OKrIi%2bo0H59fhjzbQ&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20950%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G1WlE5wNFoDqi%2b5%2bUTVrmA&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8110%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=gTkYXs59uOehFe6R7JmMmg&sysid=1)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvgdc8qf9u0kagrj7q3jrpv76pavnolmjseavmao_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or6cjh2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6odjk5tilgto5bu4ohcrjcb4mtpfiqnhoshcjbo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or6cjh2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmmiuk4vfe0q8lv3qq3im0kotp5l634cld1qrnh0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or6cjh2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs83kkag2bu1q8tutqlktmd1nchd534l57g0d1dg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or6cjh2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z54bj94pgli51j7ubaceiho2i0vp8drnm8tdsfo8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or6cjh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvb8ku5dmqlh7988hk1ah6jl7bu9am32n2h50q8o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or6cjh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgi6o2e6ci7cgrjphbic93auv9r4telq4empislg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or6cjh2bs)

---

---|---

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

1600 Daily

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg8f6aoje3pe5f639ic438ck802vmickarhqupf8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zavjikdpachf4o9db0gf675qbo5rge17jff6ol3o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkojgcuepfqu1s6r8r1sc15tdut1lpgtrjtp36b8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr2fbugtde2lqb38v32ni4aiaq6cs1pl5di6se4g_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zejjrv17qfeqt91cc78mlndgohtpn6bs66dgtnvg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z560efdf25egple0hcmab1if5rghdasds3ohsvlg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsdfku9eoef7k82lpqnenqoatq7npi4v09fffrn8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zboq6blffu5t9s7qksghglegc56csm3h8vs0sqgo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfharajjs58o452pmulejbunr4403jl0lcjb4gtg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6bg1e6bs5h97gg9icgb42820spqgh14riknk7kg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1h01oe9mrqsf1vq8coogsscif5e9lunck3tgoqg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztp22f1l1suv0bikilbbui8lu9kvscq7lg7qeg1o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2d2abd28ctibjer3p7f7p5ij6n1jmja0qqm80u0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrhr4bn9bnl8mm9pnv9eg95alredid2gqjsifl8g_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb03le59r0njqie84itmv8rg96naq9po3b0id2i0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm8ueac36j7g1d74j3jrjqpkmkm726ic29ina6tg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvh7sdubkfktuqcvu75sb89jmh71oj8gao42t5a0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8e2539kn96of7ga37b8cov05un8623kpp9c1loo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cjh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

clean_body: I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlabir95aeg8aia516dsrpf7k201kcpog6k50vs8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cdh2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z853osp3gcnq6qf0e1q2h6hkg5vn669bodt76d50_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cdh2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcmu9c3pplrl1hmt7tdp1l7se8h93u34k3q8nvh0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cdh2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr95or8ahhq13jjqnbvp4gh31e2qog43rt72i6d8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cdh2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7p1396ap0tthca89srf23hspnkkr2hqh652ehi8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cdh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z88662h4t4rsn11stv3t54hj2kdo6f3gq46tuk90_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cdh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z88i0tlbf0f36ulsbtn5eg2uucslpmgsii5imad0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpi69or1cdh2bs)

---

| |
---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

ICYMI News
---

name: Presidential Alert
subject: We’re doing something unprecedented
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Giving you a DIRECT LINE OF COMMUNICATION to the GOP presidential candidates >>

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20965%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ik4e0Xl%2bG3KdP7oCTWnCLw&sysid=1)

Friend,

We’ve NEVER done this before.

The 2024 presidential election will be the MOST IMPORTANT in our nation’s history. _That’s why we’re doing something unprecedented: giving you a _DIRECT LINE OF COMMUNICATION_ to the Republican candidates._

**[Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis, Mike Pence, and the rest of the field need to hear from grassroots patriots like YOU, Friend. It’s CRUCIAL you complete the OFFICIAL GOP DEBATE PREP SURVEY today to give them your input ahead of the big debate.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20966%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bn%2fbONkBmC6UhLivyAdkZw&sysid=1)**

**[Complete the survey in the NEXT HOUR so our team can review the best responses and send them DIRECTLY to the candidates themselves.>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20967%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cnT%2b%2fJoiqot3tslV%2b73JPg&sysid=1)**
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20968%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EU81D9wmi1md2YdDgdYjig&sysid=1)
Saving our country from the radical Left starts with taking back the White House in 2024, which requires a STRONG conservative nominee. With your help, we’ll take back the presidency and kick Biden and Kamala out of office FOR GOOD.

This critical survey is only available for the NEXT HOUR, Friend. After that, you might NEVER have the chance to influence the state of the race again.

**[Don’t delay. Take the OFFICIAL GOP DEBATE PREP SURVEY right now to give the Republican presidential candidates YOUR INPUT.>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20969%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hKegTPXVr0oD4y0TX%2fQ8Rw&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

NRSC HQ

******************************************************[TAKE THE SURVEY>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20960%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lgYO9BJVsyWJG91b5TSz%2bw&sysid=1)******************************************************

name: Kash Patel
subject: The most personal email I'll ever send you
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhkd9oamuuvfsht6abc0v7k3qrbre3t9hjekdijg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cph6coj6chh2bs)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv4pjedi7oka83e5oar86ri1jrhf4kg40lprfj5o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cph6coj6chh2bs)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7nj4qebvb0781oafasoua27enc8ueo2jlu7d2ag_rp22sh2s8i66p74cph6coj6chh2bs)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing.

**Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below.**

[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zou9c1uc33b378uhirk9ffluda8th7nsa591ar5o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cph6coj6chh2bs)
[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcp2aau5f9dp349pgfbjlrmu5gjfsh439s79df20_rp22sh2s8i66p74cph6coj6chh2bs)
[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7ksgqdif25m62a9b3trkoroufnaioe3ch90tn7o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cph6coj6chh2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z54sjp8an704j03fv191p6o6cbkl5etmpr1a7og8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cph6coj6chh2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmdmn5veu5gt1ma83t69r19m9afvg04os6blvs08_rp22sh2s8i66p74cph6coj6chh2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmv3icpk1ku4j4mlikv1o760jmlc7kcdhunktqlo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cph6coj6chh2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8o98gel986j2fqp1pbesh9a12eqrmnd837qfddo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cph6coj6chh2bs)
[Donate $2,500 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziem2fodkrm24epf6f8ileqgrk30ceffspq1q0g0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cph6coj6chh2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu5pncvb2b808144v18c7eqlbqimcfcjuetio6ko_rp22sh2s8i66p74cph6coj6chh2bs)

Thank you,

Kash Patel

**P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles.**

I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots.

[Will you help me raise $45,000 before the end of the week to support the Kash Foundation? Click here to send $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z99k6i6ju3p5ceniplhitpo99prkh42bo7d0glq0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cph6coj6chh2bs)

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ We’re sick to our stomach, Peter. 🤢 The Godless Left has struck again in the war against faith in America. This time they’ve created a movement to omit “Under God” from our country’s Pledge of Allegiance and unfortunately it’s beginning to take hold! This Sunday, we ask patriots like you to stand up to this madness by answering our latest poll: https://click.email.trustinthemission.com/?qs=174171d16f17d7ac46f1fc519c5f81479628f93a1bcd02b1b9c1c94b3a35b52d873c01e8c225a4cdd61fd1020b6f81590eb8067fa1cdb4d7a35aa1eede485e4f Do you think Under God should be removed from the Pledge of Allegiance? https://click.email.trustinthemission.com/?qs=174171d16f17d7ac46f1fc519c5f81479628f93a1bcd02b1b9c1c94b3a35b52d873c01e8c225a4cdd61fd1020b6f81590eb8067fa1cdb4d7a35aa1eede485e4f NO, I SUPPORT JUDEO-CHRISTIAN VALUES https://click.email.trustinthemission.com/?qs=174171d16f17d7ac46f1fc519c5f81479628f93a1bcd02b1b9c1c94b3a35b52d873c01e8c225a4cdd61fd1020b6f81590eb8067fa1cdb4d7a35aa1eede485e4f YES, I SUPPORT THE RADICAL LEFT Instead of running from the Judeo-Christian foundation of our Nation, we think we should embrace our founding American values. That’s why we proudly support the Pledge of Allegiance remaining UNCHANGED, reminding generations to come that America is a country built on faith. name: Mark Robinson
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
I wasn’t born with a silver spoon in my mouth.

| |
---
| | | | | I grew up as the 9th of 10 children in Greensboro. My father was an alcoholic who beat my mother. He died when I was in the fifth grade, and I was terrified. He had been the sole provider for our household. I remember sitting on the porch wondering where I’d be in five years.

Would I be in a shelter?

In foster care?

Would I be separated from my brothers and sisters?
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663238%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HTggaKo3Pq4I0MDAEN84zQ&sysid=1)
---

A few days after my father died, my mom’s friend came by. She explained that now that her husband was gone, my mother could kick her feet up and relax because the government would take care of everything.

But that wasn’t my mom.

As soon as her friend left, she got up and walked over to the local university and got a job as a janitor. She had a fifth-grade education and five kids to provide for. She chose to clean up for other kids to provide for her own. **She didn’t just rise to the challenge, she excelled. **

She gave a sense of calm and purpose to us. From that point on, we always had what we needed... _very little of what we wanted, but always what we needed. _

My mother was and always will be my hero. She showed me what strength and perseverance looked like first hand, and she taught me that with faith and hard work, I could achieve anything.

Those early years of hardship were just the beginning of my struggles.

My wife and I have endured a lot. I lost not one, but two jobs due to NAFTA.

We lost homes, cars, and were even forced into bankruptcy.

I remember lying awake at night wondering how I was going to pay the bills.

_**But I never forgot what my mother taught me, and we never gave up. **_

Together, my wife of over 30 years and I persevered and raised two incredible children. Now we have two amazing grandkids.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663238%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HTggaKo3Pq4I0MDAEN84zQ&sysid=1)
---

In 2018, my life changed when I gave a speech to the Greensboro city council that went viral.

A year later, I launched my campaign for Lieutenant Governor, and when I was elected in 2020, _**I became the first black Lieutenant Governor of North Carolina. **_

As Lieutenant Governor, I have had the privilege to work on a lot of issues, but my main focus has been on education.

It is a passion of mine, and the reason I ran for Lieutenant Governor. I have been a vocal proponent of parents knowing what their children are being taught. I have supported providing opportunities for all students to have an education that best suits them, whether that’s in a private school, charter school, home school, or public school.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663238%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HTggaKo3Pq4I0MDAEN84zQ&sysid=1)
---

Now, I’ve thrown my hat in the ring to be the next Governor of North Carolina. Not because I want to be Governor.

My campaign for Governor is not about want. _**IT’S ABOUT SERVICE.**_

Some day, you and I will be gone. And I don’t want my family to see a picture of me and wonder why I didn’t fight for them. I want my children and grandchildren to know that I did everything I could. That’s what I’m fighting for. And that’s why I’m running for Governor.

Now, I’m asking for your help.

_**This is going to be the most contested and most expensive governor’s race in the country.**_ As North Carolina goes, the nation goes. So I hope you will consider making a contribution to my campaign today. _**[Whether it’s $500 or just $5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663239%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iuSQSIT2OeQV%2bgZ%2faH6oEA&sysid=1 "Whether it’s $500 or just
$5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.")**_
---
| | | **[Donate Now](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663230%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z0KqXUvYEj1bWn%2bNeCxC%2fg&sysid=1)**
---
Thanks in advance for your support, donations, and prayers.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663238%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HTggaKo3Pq4I0MDAEN84zQ&sysid=1)
---

Mark Robinson

---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Would you be my dinner guest?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
You’re someone I can trust...

| | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663248%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yQyfps%2bC3mQbtILqMVrFPA&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
At a time when the Deep State is out to get to me in full force, I’m turning to the people I trust more than anyone in the world - my grassroots supporters like YOU.
_**I’m hosting a lovely dinner in Nashville, Tennessee this month - and I’m leaving two chairs open for a grassroots donor and a guest of your choice to join me.**_
At a time when Biden’s weaponized Department of “Justice” is trying to JAIL me for LIFE as an innocent man, there’s no one I’d rather be surrounded by than my loyal supporters like YOU.
All I ask is that you make a contribution of any amount - _yes, any amount_ - to peacefully defend our movement from the never-ending witch hunts to be automatically entered to win.
[**_Please make a contribution of any amount to be automatically entered to win - and perhaps YOU will be dining with your favorite President before you know it._**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663249%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B3bt%2feAZDvbIb0PVhU03rw&sysid=1)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name to support my plan for universal child care, and let’s fight to get it done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
A win for parents, kids, child care workers, and our whole economy. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67661563/420443609/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ15V_CHD_E_20230804_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDAzODg1Yy01ZDM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yne_LMLJE_VPuXGxjAQRNTfsdRIADI-pBHYRYJw0gK4=&emci=5203885c-5d34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=5403885c-5d34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
A recent report gave me 19,961 more reasons to fight for universal child care. That’s how many dollars the average Massachusetts family has to spend on child care for one child every year. _Nearly $20,000._ It’s almost twice the national average, which is way, way too high already. And it’s over half the median income for a single mother. So if a mom is busting her tail to build a future for her and her toddler, she could be forking over more than half her paycheck. Maybe a family member can help out, like my Aunt Bee did for me. But maybe they can’t. I’ve got a plan to tackle this issue head-on. **My plan for universal child care would...**
* Cap costs for every family in America (with half paying no more than $10 a day)
* Ensure access by funding child care centers across the country
* Give child care workers a raise by making sure they get wages and benefits comparable to public school teachers with similar credentials

We can get this done. But it will take a nationwide investment. And we’ll only get there with a grassroots movement. [**Add your name to support my plan for universal child care and say that you’ll fight to make it happen. I’m always honored to fight by your side.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67661564/420443610/1304208263?refcode=EMZ15V_CHD_E_20230804_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDAzODg1Yy01ZDM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yne_LMLJE_VPuXGxjAQRNTfsdRIADI-pBHYRYJw0gK4=&emci=5203885c-5d34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=5403885c-5d34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67661565/420443611/1304208263?refcode=EMZ15V_CHD_E_20230804_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDAzODg1Yy01ZDM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yne_LMLJE_VPuXGxjAQRNTfsdRIADI-pBHYRYJw0gK4=&emci=5203885c-5d34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=5403885c-5d34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
This bold reform would make a real difference in people’s daily lives.
More families would be able to make ends meet by not straining to cover child care.
More parents would be able to finish their educations, or start new jobs, without having to worry about who’ll take care of their little ones.
More small businesses would be able to fill open positions with all those new workers in the mix — lifting up our whole economy.
More child care workers would be able to stay in their field, instead of needing to switch industries because the pay is too low.
And more kids would start their educations with solid foundations. That would pay off for decades to come — in improved graduation rates, in higher incomes, and even in reduced health risks. Every dollar spent on quality early education is an investment in America’s future.
[**Universal child care would be a win for parents, kids, child care workers, and our whole economy. I’m staying in the fight to get it done. Add your name if you are too.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67661566/420443613/1304208263?refcode=EMZ15V_CHD_E_20230804_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDAzODg1Yy01ZDM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yne_LMLJE_VPuXGxjAQRNTfsdRIADI-pBHYRYJw0gK4=&emci=5203885c-5d34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=5403885c-5d34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth
