name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e61e8be92df4d85af47c25019096253&_e=CzHl8F9P4QLdpYs1gIf682NWrBsE2aK_oo25tyTRKHRZh8LqIYSXT8l0dxEO_GExKS7XKRHGNlaT6gNA8nYMA3UfVw5CGjNKmBcAF1cH3QSlLAEIo90FJ0DtaIDk4kFIDzvNqABlQa_hv06bqPPc94JfBPdHGyfRfOntNqCC0cGssRcZ5na6OXmD4n_HXkYZ1R2ViMg5Ozgt7FmdfPyBUBmZwQ1oTpYBom7lij07XXpWfweuGgIxcUWrGYnxgI4iX1IDmqBIXKBBM0yRRyGk3We8qn2gQh_XV_7hjHwL_deHAXhQ5b0r1PEZI_phpIowd_f3cZzAakceUAYj4qH9UI38i4n8kgTJpow7KMY0Egrt5kx1oGQCl9AuX5OLIYvFh0ZPkP-Zaxgcvx9zlx8hD_4ixD3BelLheX0VaBWSA-o%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e61e8be92df4d85af47c25019096253&_e=CzHl8F9P4QLdpYs1gIf682NWrBsE2aK_oo25tyTRKHRZh8LqIYSXT8l0dxEO_GExKS7XKRHGNlaT6gNA8nYMA3UfVw5CGjNKmBcAF1cH3QSlLAEIo90FJ0DtaIDk4kFIDzvNqABlQa_hv06bqPPc94JfBPdHGyfRfOntNqCC0cGssRcZ5na6OXmD4n_HXkYZ1R2ViMg5Ozgt7FmdfPyBUBmZwQ1oTpYBom7lij07XXpWfweuGgIxcUWrGYnxgI4iX1IDmqBIXKBBM0yRRyGk3eDMBF24C_mekNdj6Qksq8c4APeKnPQYnNbkdWCS6g3aNFDjq_-8a4lVKXEcaB2iMXjzZDcn5xSLeqQ-_66aeiQxwi_m0ecmg8jcIb1NPJ_AY1rVOY10JSaOFVLBaaEWklI6bchWqbJahB31mwFTf0k%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e61e8be92df4d85af47c25019096253&_e=CzHl8F9P4QLdpYs1gIf682NWrBsE2aK_oo25tyTRKHRZh8LqIYSXT8l0dxEO_GExKS7XKRHGNlaT6gNA8nYMA3UfVw5CGjNKmBcAF1cH3QSlLAEIo90FJ0DtaIDk4kFIDzvNqABlQa_hv06bqPPc94JfBPdHGyfRfOntNqCC0cGssRcZ5na6OXmD4n_HXkYZ1R2ViMg5Ozgt7FmdfPyBUBmZwQ1oTpYBom7lij07XXpWfweuGgIxcUWrGYnxgI4iX1IDmqBIXKBBM0yRRyGk3Tddwgs2hsaQcZg8ahY-qO1OMrKTi15OzK-7XYDlE3wLTVxmlHU86yX_BavshBbxlIu9jEv83iF9d3yrTjMc0xadT5k0DjKTejNgHkSHkr4Qm-VUHrkc5e_YpkcCYz0RlKio3ijiwEz8SoR6cyFpIoo%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4e61e8be92df4d85af47c25019096253&_e=CzHl8F9P4QLdpYs1gIf682NWrBsE2aK_oo25tyTRKHRZh8LqIYSXT8l0dxEO_GExKS7XKRHGNlaT6gNA8nYMA3UfVw5CGjNKmBcAF1cH3QSlLAEIo90FJ0DtaIDk4kFIDzvNqABlQa_hv06bqPPc94JfBPdHGyfRfOntNqCC0cGssRcZ5na6OXmD4n_HXkYZ1R2ViMg5Ozgt7FmdfPyBUBmZwQ1oTpYBom7lij07XXpWfweuGgIxcUWrGYnxgI4iX1IDmqBIXKBBM0yRRyGk3bF0u6Tb9jsoSGtFS8L2xJqELO4ho4YSMjmOugDKupVpZALmdvxMlsc5TebilNYXc5r_0KdPY0_HgzPYiFj3TiGxfy3UVXbS4-hpQGxTAtRgJYvHtTy6iYl2YfnIyXCr3wXZ-yWCR2qmaqvTFtMUtyU%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: President Trump
subject: Senate Republicans have asked me to reach out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
To my most loyal supporters for their input

Friend - President Trump here.

Senate Republicans have asked me to reach out to **my most loyal supporters for their input. **

_With 2024 right around the corner, we are asking fellow Patriots if you are still with us. _

name: Mark Robinson
subject: Can I share a quick story?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth.

| |
---
| | | | | I grew up as the 9th of 10 children in Greensboro. My father was an alcoholic who beat my mother. He died when I was in the fifth grade, and I was terrified. He had been the sole provider for our household. I remember sitting on the porch wondering where I'd be in five years.

Would I be in a shelter?

In foster care?

Would I be separated from my brothers and sisters?
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=299f551ef1d145b7a94bbe27450c7b4e&_e=_4ji0_hWii-VT8fe1cS7rQ4ZEsMJN7qoxlJCGfaexel4MoST6z2NEpxqcUbJgmRkGUV3T1iA_0SAVU_5D5ECtdeXO5IyKdaeeeNE5gtq9owSQLdsOffIFOZzmJV8b_OVhLD0Slol8OuXQXhtZPvDxnhPFnq3xXbRalLwDoF3xTvmtU-_Vcua56c9cpX6Kr1FtScQsg6cirzlQhrdGFt5NOPSkvKb2S-xuLpLm-gZAeM6rlwemHPbHCMs_4HyG54i0azvnLHCs-uJU-56nx6T8qHGODtxjuy7nF2rWO0iXUkaPSaeDaiOcbHsBb4kKOBHzACBhgjvx_4ybMdky-5qchIUNlt-a5WJVe9QTvr3ky6ZLmfSvB1xYWv-6P1ckTTZ_HEXr5OY8LBVwQmPxw6BP-opZNfwhKRiPYfFiWH7qMxvnMethobaHp0JZhx5KQxzQi2L5dARJmpTxXAj8QbGAg%3D%3D)
---

A few days after my father died, my mom's friend came by. She explained that now that her husband was gone, my mother could kick her feet up and relax because the government would take care of everything.

But that wasn't my mom.

As soon as her friend left, she got up and walked over to the local university and got a job as a janitor. She had a fifth-grade education and five kids to provide for. She chose to clean up for other kids to provide for her own. **She didn 't just rise to the challenge, she excelled. **

She gave a sense of calm and purpose to us. From that point on, we always had what we needed... _very little of what we wanted, but always what we needed. _

My mother was and always will be my hero. She showed me what strength and perseverance looked like first hand, and she taught me that with faith and hard work, I could achieve anything.

Those early years of hardship were just the beginning of my struggles.

My wife and I have endured a lot. I lost not one, but two jobs due to NAFTA.

We lost homes, cars, and were even forced into bankruptcy.

I remember lying awake at night wondering how I was going to pay the bills.

_**But I never forgot what my mother taught me, and we never gave up. **_

Together, my wife of over 30 years and I persevered and raised two incredible children. Now we have two amazing grandkids.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=299f551ef1d145b7a94bbe27450c7b4e&_e=_4ji0_hWii-VT8fe1cS7rQ4ZEsMJN7qoxlJCGfaexel4MoST6z2NEpxqcUbJgmRkGUV3T1iA_0SAVU_5D5ECtdeXO5IyKdaeeeNE5gtq9owSQLdsOffIFOZzmJV8b_OVhLD0Slol8OuXQXhtZPvDxnhPFnq3xXbRalLwDoF3xTvmtU-_Vcua56c9cpX6Kr1FtScQsg6cirzlQhrdGFt5NOPSkvKb2S-xuLpLm-gZAeM6rlwemHPbHCMs_4HyG54i0azvnLHCs-uJU-56nx6T8qHGODtxjuy7nF2rWO0iXUkaPSaeDaiOcbHsBb4kKOBHlZJUeO3LMZCAbZSPG07KxLAH_PDIZUvjSFME7Pr3tgCDvVKPfs1_r0eL9VmoUbDgbuLCn1iWUHh_mc5AgpIrTCk8skKGrxYy6nnQGdhTsF-KOZkiw98M72RGlxrGWsgfX2-_q-mdtWmPDyLDgn2vBQ%3D%3D)
---

In 2018, my life changed when I gave a speech to the Greensboro city council that went viral.

A year later, I launched my campaign for Lieutenant Governor, and when I was elected in 2020, _**I became the first black Lieutenant Governor of North Carolina. **_

As Lieutenant Governor, I have had the privilege to work on a lot of issues, but my main focus has been on education.

It is a passion of mine, and the reason I ran for Lieutenant Governor. I have been a vocal proponent of parents knowing what their children are being taught. I have supported providing opportunities for all students to have an education that best suits them, whether that's in a private school, charter school, home school, or public school.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=299f551ef1d145b7a94bbe27450c7b4e&_e=_4ji0_hWii-VT8fe1cS7rQ4ZEsMJN7qoxlJCGfaexel4MoST6z2NEpxqcUbJgmRkGUV3T1iA_0SAVU_5D5ECtdeXO5IyKdaeeeNE5gtq9owSQLdsOffIFOZzmJV8b_OVhLD0Slol8OuXQXhtZPvDxnhPFnq3xXbRalLwDoF3xTvmtU-_Vcua56c9cpX6Kr1FtScQsg6cirzlQhrdGFt5NOPSkvKb2S-xuLpLm-gZAeM6rlwemHPbHCMs_4HyG54i0azvnLHCs-uJU-56nx6T8qHGODtxjuy7nF2rWO0iXUkaPSaeDaiOcbHsBb4kKOBHGMpWt5Umo0yYGCrr4YJ15LJW-QWP_t1K-QiFqzdREf-VMpTTU9UE8ejXE9lJ3T69E4xxO6gxr8plnJjsMXleb3ZOrjV6WAK1F-DnA82p9RJoH1qtZ_BHaAepS471_qFiLWiwyFiDN6fMLqMT10r-VA%3D%3D)
---

Now, I've thrown my hat in the ring to be the next Governor of North Carolina. Not because I want to be Governor.

My campaign for Governor is not about want. _**IT 'S ABOUT SERVICE.**_

Some day, you and I will be gone. And I don't want my family to see a picture of me and wonder why I didn't fight for them. I want my children and grandchildren to know that I did everything I could. That's what I'm fighting for. And that's why I'm running for Governor.

Now, I'm asking for your help.

_**This is going to be the most contested and most expensive governor 's race in the country.**_ As North Carolina goes, the nation goes. So I hope you will consider making a contribution to my campaign today. _**[Whether it's $500 or just $5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=299f551ef1d145b7a94bbe27450c7b4e&_e=_4ji0_hWii-VT8fe1cS7rQ4ZEsMJN7qoxlJCGfaexel4MoST6z2NEpxqcUbJgmRkGUV3T1iA_0SAVU_5D5ECtdeXO5IyKdaeeeNE5gtq9owSQLdsOffIFOZzmJV8b_OVhLD0Slol8OuXQXhtZPvDxnhPFnq3xXbRalLwDoF3xTvmtU-_Vcua56c9cpX6Kr1FtScQsg6cirzlQhrdGFt5NOPSkvKb2S-xuLpLm-gZAeM6rlwemHPbHCMs_4HyG54i0azvnLHCs-uJU-56nx6T8qHGODtxjuy7nF2rWO0iXUkaPSaeDaiOcbHsBb4kKOBHWRfGMgfZ13LUwUnDmrW0xqNfR7MKFSG-ZjsaBUzb69ZyP2d_Sx_9JTJ5Sh3jxGvbzMD0GdXENVn3_387rcqlvi_i5SYeEtfE433OGDS99ebiadVy3W1ircebN56yMvuHlUzCl89WB4UWvmnWXiaDnQ%3D%3D "Whether it’s $500 or just $5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.")**_

Thanks in advance for your support, donations, and prayers.

clean_body: I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. | | | | | | | I grew up as the 9th of 10 children in Greensboro. My father was an alcoholic who beat my mother. He died when I was in the fifth grade, and I was terrified. He had been the sole provider for our household. I remember sitting on the porch wondering where I'd be in five years. Would I be in a shelter? In foster care? Would I be separated from my brothers and sisters? | A few days after my father died, my mom's friend came by. She explained that now that her husband was gone, my mother could kick her feet up and relax because the government would take care of everything. But that wasn't my mom. As soon as her friend left, she got up and walked over to the local university and got a job as a janitor. She had a fifth-grade education and five kids to provide for. She chose to clean up for other kids to provide for her own. She didn 't just rise to the challenge, she excelled. She gave a sense of calm and purpose to us. From that point on, we always had what we needed... very little of what we wanted, but always what we needed. My mother was and always will be my hero. She showed me what strength and perseverance looked like first hand, and she taught me that with faith and hard work, I could achieve anything. Those early years of hardship were just the beginning of my struggles. My wife and I have endured a lot. I lost not one, but two jobs due to NAFTA. We lost homes, cars, and were even forced into bankruptcy. I remember lying awake at night wondering how I was going to pay the bills. But I never forgot what my mother taught me, and we never gave up. Together, my wife of over 30 years and I persevered and raised two incredible children. Now we have two amazing grandkids. | In 2018, my life changed when I gave a speech to the Greensboro city council that went viral. A year later, I launched my campaign for Lieutenant Governor, and when I was elected in 2020, I became the first black Lieutenant Governor of North Carolina. As Lieutenant Governor, I have had the privilege to work on a lot of issues, but my main focus has been on education. It is a passion of mine, and the reason I ran for Lieutenant Governor. I have been a vocal proponent of parents knowing what their children are being taught. I have supported providing opportunities for all students to have an education that best suits them, whether that's in a private school, charter school, home school, or public school. | Now, I've thrown my hat in the ring to be the next Governor of North Carolina. Not because I want to be Governor. My campaign for Governor is not about want. IT 'S ABOUT SERVICE. Some day, you and I will be gone. And I don't want my family to see a picture of me and wonder why I didn't fight for them. I want my children and grandchildren to know that I did everything I could. That's what I'm fighting for. And that's why I'm running for Governor. Now, I'm asking for your help. This is going to be the most contested and most expensive governor 's race in the country. As North Carolina goes, the nation goes. So I hope you will consider making a contribution to my campaign today. "Whether it’s $500 or just $5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history." | | | Thanks in advance for your support, donations, and prayers. | Mark Robinson | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson Business donations are not allowed. Donations must be made by individuals and cannot exceed $6,400 for the cycle. Donations are not tax-deductible. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt5ko4ak0ajpdcotceictc41dlqpta190kobqipg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj60ob2c1h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj57oshqkputamh9i39v7edod9fspfba1u6967rg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj60ob2c1h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z66oqpf2l8063g83pae8cotk2enl0j05008fmdi8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj60ob2c1h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu27ipajmtcul8qhbm956rjrar430dvunvmkj5bo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj60ob2c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcp51vtj9uumm050gk9eejm15pgejtodhbl9de0o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj60ob2c1h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6uc3dgup77lv18tcfrvb13l4o0u19fkad27pkkg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj60ob2c1h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6mn0c6r112ds1audvhoalg7j0cfgno7gjc85hbo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj60ob2c1h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcsi1jnbbhfsjojpc73qibocqe9fkeej9pguj5hg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj60ob2c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z86lhq4ba56ots3437ok6phm4rkqva8i3pjobir0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj62o36c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk8h40v7rk172nk994jft718d2vb9p7al4k079c8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj62o36c9h2bs) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3pmnbivpjun8qhffcidfpkjcp5do8qvuenmnsa8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj62o36c9h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Block a new plastics megafactory
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915485?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **Towering smokestacks SPITTING dark clouds of pollution. Grimy pipelines SNAKING along the Mississippi River. Communities POISONED. Ecosystems DESTROYED. ** _**Your urgent action is needed**_ to prevent Formosa Plastics’ mega-polluting industrial complex from dominating 2,400 acres along the Mississippi River in Louisiana >> [_**Please send your message now!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915486?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) This proposed petrochemical plant threatens the river’s wildlife and ecosystems. To make matters worse, it would be constructed in **Cancer Alley -- a community already known for its astronomical pollution!** That would mean more _**cancer, respiratory illnesses, headaches, and nausea**_ for a community that corporations already see as a sacrifice zone. **President Biden can BLOCK Formosa’s plastics plant** \-- but we need 2,938 more signatures from your area before our _**urgent MIDNIGHT deadline**_ to help convince him. [**Please, Friend, will you STOP this toxic plant from POISONING communities and wildlife in Louisiana? >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915487?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915488?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Formosa Plastics cannot be trusted. It was barred from operating this proposed plant where _**its own headquarters are located**_ \-- in Taiwan. **If Formosa can’t be trusted in its own backyard, why should it be trusted here?**
The truth is that Formosa has already proven it can’t be trusted here. For years it illegally released **BILLIONS of plastic pellets** into waterways in Texas.
Each moment President Biden waits to REVOKE Formosa’s permit is a step closer to more polluted communities and damaged ecosystems. [**Don’t wait another second, Friend – send your message to President Biden and FIGHT pollution in Cancer Alley! **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915489?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915488?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Friend,
At a time when the Deep State is out to get to me in full force, I'm turning to the people I trust more than anyone in the world - my grassroots supporters like YOU.
_**I 'm hosting a lovely dinner in Nashville, Tennessee this month - and I'm leaving two chairs open for a grassroots donor and a guest of your choice to join me.**_
At a time when Biden's weaponized Department of "Justice" is trying to JAIL me for LIFE as an innocent man, there's no one I'd rather be surrounded by than my loyal supporters like YOU.
All I ask is that you make a contribution of any amount - _yes, any amount_ - to peacefully defend our movement from the never-ending witch hunts to be automatically entered to win.

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end

|
---
| | |
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu17aeup3p46q6jot3fum02417j52b5u9c3kkqj8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj6ao74cph2bs "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ubn5hrn674f4nvbs33qj70u4hhcfl1975nlvq0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj6ao74cph2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation.

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjkcrald86fnvevuul26su6k9duigmc3e5sr6350_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj6ao74cph2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zforbo5upfi3sr24mqslnrrijombafp7op7s9ruo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj6ao74cph2bs "DONATE TODAY")

body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6758c05689424c98a43e3c3528727af4&_e=vMzk4MNQApJMxH6GZbK6Wo8xLC-FQTxmtXIiTFHZY2ox1pWfz489Jk8CHBfAMNoM8S4Loqwp-KdGeBSvtcS_S_5qeooCQYQ0am_ZsCulC-iKYWl5vu0gi-wp7rbb2Dp9f47E0zprrx5Fomb6rqEfTbPDKeGJn-9H4E3eJoFixRum7Pie8MDk70-kmMC0KY2J0BjUtBRWkUQuMC-ik_md9I5DWcw5-2Rj_pNRgd5D2nJ2smS9Jy7wvjUUD-bh8HLF1EWDWs0qANLE8gzZMa_WPw%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6758c05689424c98a43e3c3528727af4&_e=vMzk4MNQApJMxH6GZbK6Wo8xLC-FQTxmtXIiTFHZY2ox1pWfz489Jk8CHBfAMNoM8S4Loqwp-KdGeBSvtcS_S_5qeooCQYQ0am_ZsCulC-iKYWl5vu0gi-wp7rbb2Dp9zzl8vCKRhkjwC-CFTzZm-24E3MDDahz99m4tUSYbzoY87EmN5nlFmdgmeD0JTBIkx_ntK_XVIhyuawHk3QcsHg1SSwKnE-ECS-zRbubnqiZkUekPestxrpBCIXqeZ3qRy_jrBetMFNyOpEhbFIr44Q%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6758c05689424c98a43e3c3528727af4&_e=vMzk4MNQApJMxH6GZbK6Wo8xLC-FQTxmtXIiTFHZY2ox1pWfz489Jk8CHBfAMNoM8S4Loqwp-KdGeBSvtcS_S_5qeooCQYQ0am_ZsCulC-iKYWl5vu0gi-wp7rbb2Dp9K2GtBHy-n3Jc0sXVk5N9EmEPHqieg31v7fMiLfXGYWUn2OV1yI27HKeYETzu-FOJchfdlteKGXAJLDlP8iHTf9KGxWN9J-C3hP-wzdueW0Nytg-j5xnuZ0Z5H_a1Xo4svwoXaG3T6j1U5TD2OVLzww%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

body:
To my most loyal supporters for their input

Friend - President Trump here.

Senate Republicans have asked me to reach out to **my most loyal supporters for their input. **

_With 2024 right around the corner, we are asking fellow Patriots if you are still with us. _

name: American Briefing
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf7kkrjmku43gg24nup5d9cb8kop6mu665do70ng_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj6eor4c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6mjtqv1agsb7kk3o18cnkopuu6cogshm0u97k3g_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj6eor4c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgem3tjslro9b8a9l2p54fgglbr2v53uhf9h4708_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpj6eor4c9h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

The VRA didn’t end voter suppression, but it was a monumental step in the right direction. It banned literacy tests and helped end the practice of poll taxes designed to keep folks from casting a ballot. name: Kash Patel
subject: This J6 news will make your jaw drop
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03018a72bb974dcfbeb3405b4b2d5066&_e=JL9xjEQmDntUX5jmMwdelatKhlnQMtu6aJ_5zYpVOSaDHTO5Nhsit-A8lGtGLn3UsQ6qGdaLfC2ZhZazazqRUpeyCAUvmvwx0meQs2MkLADtBHU7LjoIgSOOJPzKruqfvAq5ZmeRLl6HNIUEoSovDU1-z2aLcRU8Cus9d6IM2JhEu_0k8ehiwT1R4ZarNYObppw91sD2NVuUkloXfgoHeeah_nbQgxwHv3fSFgVXbibCnn3UMctbVpSPRE6-BacNVOmSOgVOjAB6_fLwOvv6lg%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03018a72bb974dcfbeb3405b4b2d5066&_e=JL9xjEQmDntUX5jmMwdelatKhlnQMtu6aJ_5zYpVOSaDHTO5Nhsit-A8lGtGLn3UsQ6qGdaLfC2ZhZazazqRUpeyCAUvmvwx0meQs2MkLADtBHU7LjoIgSOOJPzKruqfs8jE4-HBFwgkRETsapTFeQ7-jUCibD2WxbMmhVe7m9hNCssMVWS2XL8axVqzDRM9BIyXRueFV0qdyU67lt4A2MYw-7ZOdDHeDmTLQN7ZLGa-mIxxzQSChMWMF2ZMhJv7wisLUlZaxg7Tu8T5YHco6w%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03018a72bb974dcfbeb3405b4b2d5066&_e=JL9xjEQmDntUX5jmMwdelatKhlnQMtu6aJ_5zYpVOSaDHTO5Nhsit-A8lGtGLn3UsQ6qGdaLfC2ZhZazazqRUpeyCAUvmvwx0meQs2MkLADtBHU7LjoIgSOOJPzKruqfskOwMfLYyYYzmLiVjYtuOsTLBbCSB_Plr_fbp3IxFX4Okz5bITzYER4vEvMxmbSfSQ5NWMPe4wLMMgZG3i1JeMm0-rInAojIlrhOb8pIijz6Svewa8b1AZKsmkRSGoj2CxkOFmNHXByWTEKjSRHdwA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=03018a72bb974dcfbeb3405b4b2d5066&_e=JL9xjEQmDntUX5jmMwdelatKhlnQMtu6aJ_5zYpVOSaDHTO5Nhsit-A8lGtGLn3UsQ6qGdaLfC2ZhZazazqRUpeyCAUvmvwx0meQs2MkLADtBHU7LjoIgSOOJPzKruqf_lJjr8RYndZTo49zWm4iXXzY0ofj7c2DtL9exFezYCvdw9jzc4pdf9-hI-k-xhepix9AFm1IY8YSG_l-Pd7EvcG27mmTvjgeqZmw74u_0K5zweL_lT-rCD9cPUlVpNpaFxF4D9q162OCgEMCc48puQ%3D%3D)

Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd3idb50g3ekfdvg7lghgkpker5igqeieaugo1ug_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj4c5h2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zphk61a3kmmic6q4gf58fu8sagd911629d5rs1eg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj4c5h2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl51f3duho49g0qfi398um62gg8ufuabcc5hm0uo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj4c5h2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi2c4haf8tet1a2f8aup2960cc0gghe1ljqgkneo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj4c5h2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfhpk3etf1qen0d67gk654q933oqdd0q5gn94eqg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj4c5h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl6ji2e0kpmmvliiiegc2topr6mgkc9l0fnt9nog_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj4c5h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhufvojmdqe0qurng2b2ij806afh18eifvdsraug_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj4c5h2bs)

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Mark=C2=A0Robinson?=
subject: Can I share a quick story?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
I wasn’t born with a silver spoon in my mouth.
%%previewtext%%
%recipient.md5_hash%
| |
---
| | | | | I grew up as the 9th of 10 children in Greensboro. My father was an alcoholic who beat my mother. He died when I was in the fifth grade, and I was terrified. He had been the sole provider for our household. I remember sitting on the porch wondering where I'd be in five years.

Would I be in a shelter?

In foster care?

Would I be separated from my brothers and sisters?
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkas2entqoclahlh3r9gd61lvd7e0acgdh3ag13o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs)
---

A few days after my father died, my mom's friend came by. She explained that now that her husband was gone, my mother could kick her feet up and relax because the government would take care of everything.

But that wasn't my mom.

As soon as her friend left, she got up and walked over to the local university and got a job as a janitor. She had a fifth-grade education and five kids to provide for. She chose to clean up for other kids to provide for her own. **She didn 't just rise to the challenge, she excelled. **

She gave a sense of calm and purpose to us. From that point on, we always had what we needed... _very little of what we wanted, but always what we needed. _

My mother was and always will be my hero. She showed me what strength and perseverance looked like first hand, and she taught me that with faith and hard work, I could achieve anything.

Those early years of hardship were just the beginning of my struggles.

My wife and I have endured a lot. I lost not one, but two jobs due to NAFTA.

We lost homes, cars, and were even forced into bankruptcy.

I remember lying awake at night wondering how I was going to pay the bills.

_**But I never forgot what my mother taught me, and we never gave up. **_

Together, my wife of over 30 years and I persevered and raised two incredible children. Now we have two amazing grandkids.

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj1gihgij8r12m34kt045i89mplcfpidc0ifnqdg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs)
---

In 2018, my life changed when I gave a speech to the Greensboro city council that went viral.

A year later, I launched my campaign for Lieutenant Governor, and when I was elected in 2020, _**I became the first black Lieutenant Governor of North Carolina. **_

As Lieutenant Governor, I have had the privilege to work on a lot of issues, but my main focus has been on education.

It is a passion of mine, and the reason I ran for Lieutenant Governor. I have been a vocal proponent of parents knowing what their children are being taught. I have supported providing opportunities for all students to have an education that best suits them, whether that's in a private school, charter school, home school, or public school.

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztv9g8poo2j2jbb2dc9uv7j61vquu8r2g4ne0cso_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs)
---

Now, I've thrown my hat in the ring to be the next Governor of North Carolina. Not because I want to be Governor.

My campaign for Governor is not about want. _**IT 'S ABOUT SERVICE.**_

Some day, you and I will be gone. And I don't want my family to see a picture of me and wonder why I didn't fight for them. I want my children and grandchildren to know that I did everything I could. That's what I'm fighting for. And that's why I'm running for Governor.

Now, I'm asking for your help.

_**This is going to be the most contested and most expensive governor 's race in the country.**_ As North Carolina goes, the nation goes. So I hope you will consider making a contribution to my campaign today. _**[Whether it's $500 or just $5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrbvt0jtf9rmc61l4m5eb5v5kr3lo03s2hoq73bg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs "Whether it’s $500 or just $5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.")**_
---
| | | **[Donate Now](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmt9nr2k2smmc3p5dt5t58fa7sak251piu9s8bb8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs)**
---
Thanks in advance for your support, donations, and prayers.

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2ukqq5k1v3h8e8hjpqiai8sd0sd0uums0vt4jqg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs)
---

Mark Robinson

---
|
---

---

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Majority Leader Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Sorry to put that thought in your head, Peter.
#

Peter:
We all know this guy.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230806-1-30&t=1&akid=885%2E734936%2ER0eXro)
Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell.
But if he has his way this cycle, his title is going to change.
Senate **MAJORITY** Leader Mitch McConnell.
And if it does, that’s the ballgame.
Everything we’ve been able to do over the last several years goes down the drain. And everything our Democratic Senate has blocked — from restrictions on voting rights to a national abortion ban — is at the top of the agenda for a GOP Senate.
Sorry to put that thought in your head, Peter. But it’s true.
Control in the Senate, our Democratic Majority in the Senate, is going to come down to Arizona.
It’s going to come down to Ruben Gallego.
And right now, we’re a pure toss-up state. Could go either way.
That’s why we need your help, right now.
[**A donation of $5 helps Ruben get to his fundraising goal. And when Ruben hits those goals, he’s more likely to win. And if Ruben wins, we’re one seat further from Majority Leader McConnell.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230806-1-30&t=2&akid=885%2E734936%2ER0eXro)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-aug23.7Jwrcb&refcode=em230806-1-30&t=21&akid=885%2E734936%2ER0eXro)**

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb605kud75vt80vju7t227eo4lkeoml4g2v32n1o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj4cth2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zr8ep494n91a7jfa0vj3p8uf3agctc3bl1315rn8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj4cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za1bi0f5rh2tpktk0tmr2432u2fjgrqffolrpab8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj4cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3ll5qvsb8qcmr8f1ifi3pbrgrgev1fd8pg0kb30_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshi62pr3clg648d245p25oh4cdie8pj1chh68pr24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zon4qhlj0g5hpgn6mtki1gfsmdvcfto5868h8790_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj4cth2bs)_

name: Kash Patel
subject: We are pissing off the right people.
body:
Now, I have just one last question for you.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuht4jrqulfhp9ah9hdp6p6g9v94s7rqih352q0o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tj4edg6fdb7c5ob9ddn6lgbfc5mcgo61dlgs1rbfc3466qe4db4c1qnfd3gmkoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj35d5jcorr4cb66jgb6o37m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm9p36c5i64oj0c8iv0)
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr3ns8eegmlbjundjamc26e39enhce5oh26rjato_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs)

Friend,

You wouldn't believe what leftist Rep. Jackson Lee said about the Kash Foundation.
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2fpj43l0cop0sh6fsfc371843lcol0prncqfkbo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs)
She is trying to accuse us of providing "cash gifts" to members of the FBI when nothing could be further from the truth!

I did exactly what I set out to do when I founded the Kash Foundation. We provided legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they brought forth credible information on corruption.

While it's shocking that a member of Congress would go so far out of her way to try and vilify us, I couldn't be happier.

**_We are pissing off the right people_.**

The members of the Deep State are getting scared. Their days are over. As the Kash Foundation encourages more and more whistleblowers are coming forward, we will expose all their corruption.

[That's why I need your help. My goal is to raise $50,000 before the end of the week to protect whistleblowers from Deep State retaliation.

Please consider chipping in any amount you can afford to help the Kash Foundation defend whistleblowers by clicking below.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztfcoajaapkjvc4427q0pgevvqd9lcc51dpjri38_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs)

[Donate](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp646chiub5km0s95aplb9kr5nrsosla9fma04d8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs)

Can you imagine giving up your career, financial livelihood, privacy, and peace of mind to do what you feel is right and expose the FBI's corruption to the rest of your fellow American citizens?

**And Rep. Jackson Lee has the nerve to accuse _the whistleblowers_ of corruption!**

These people are heroes! We owe a debt to the brave whistleblowers who come forward to share their information about corruption within our government.

Whistleblowers put themselves and their families at risk to expose the Government Gangsters within the Department of Justice and throughout our government.

**But, if you and I can provide them with the legal and financial support they need to stand up against the Deep State, then more whistleblowers will be encouraged to come forward. **

**You can make a huge impact in the fight to expose government corruption. Please donate $10, $35, or even $100 today by clicking below. **

[Donate $50 >>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0f8i2rrki0nhvftutu2andlec4si581ds0ob1jg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zv6jra9vmr03ldino01egtvjuq719lph88q4ej08_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zg4qlro4uj322qoum9e4namnsgfpdnbkt7vsn2sg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuahupq36k2d4khketdbf42g5rs0k3pc0lms66d8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkc83fmo3uspqviml7ia3o4lfpd8erqh23p7ipa0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cpgm8oj2c1h2bs)

I started the Kash Foundation because I know what whistleblowers need and what to expect when they come forward.

I blew the whistle on the FBI and DOJ too. During the Russiagate investigation, I uncovered that the FB and DOJI illegally sabotaged a presidential race. The Deep State spied on me while I was conducting this investigation because I exposed their unlawful conduct.

Now, I have just one last question for you.

Will you join the fight and help me protect whistleblowers from the Deep State?

Kash Patel

body:
If you want a yard sign or would like to volunteer, please sign up. | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64cf9c67f7eee17351c10f4c&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D64ad17b196408356beb93eaa%26ss_email_id%3D64cf9c67f7eee17351c10f4c%26ss_campaign_name%3DSign%2Bup%2Bto%2Bvolunteer%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-08-06T13%253A14%253A39Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64ad17b196408356beb93eaa&l=en-US&s=vf5Ii1TlteHImMsR9uvGrDmhwgE%3D)
---
| It’s Sunday morning and Ashley and I are getting the kids ready for church. Last night, we were talking about the campaign and how we need a huge grassroots army to beat back Washington Democrats.Last year, we came up just short in the most expensive congressional race in the nation. Next year, it’s an open seat and the Cook Political Report [rates it a “toss-up.”](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64cf9c67f7eee17351c10f4c&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cookpolitical.com%2Fratings%2Fhouse-race-ratings&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64ad17b196408356beb93eaa&l=en-US&s=HzYw-gDB9A3G84uqMj31MFPzMAg%3D) President Trump won Michigan’s 7th District in 2016 by 4% and Biden won it in 2020 by less than 1%.My opponent is Gretchen Whitmer’s top lobbyist and spent 22-years in elected office.**We are going to win in 2024 but we need a grassroots army to get it done!** If you are willing to volunteer, please [click here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64cf9c67f7eee17351c10f4c&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2Fget-involved%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D64ad17b196408356beb93eaa%26ss_email_id%3D64cf9c67f7eee17351c10f4c%26ss_campaign_name%3DSign%2Bup%2Bto%2Bvolunteer%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-08-06T13%253A14%253A39Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_64ad17b196408356beb93eaa&l=en-US&s=ImP6s-mcN7f5Tt00HGb5CZAByP4%3D) and join the Barrett Brigade today!

clean_body: If you want a yard sign or would like to volunteer, please sign up. | | | | It’s Sunday morning and Ashley and I are getting the kids ready for church. Last night, we were talking about the campaign and how we need a huge grassroots army to beat back Washington Democrats.Last year, we came up just short in the most expensive congressional race in the nation. Next year, it’s an open seat and the Cook Political Report President Trump won Michigan’s 7th District in 2016 by 4% and Biden won it in 2020 by less than 1%.My opponent is Gretchen Whitmer’s top lobbyist and spent 22-years in elected office.We are going to win in 2024 but we need a grassroots army to get it done! If you are willing to volunteer, please and join the Barrett Brigade today! If you live in Michigan’s 7th Congressional District and would like a yard sign, please . | If you don’t live in the 7th District and can’t volunteer, I hope you will to help our cause.Ashley and I are ready for this fight and we hope we can count on you to join the team! | | PAID FOR BY TOM BARRETT FOR CONGRESS | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@tombarrettforcongress.com ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- PO Box 15221, Lansing MI 48901, USA

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: Members of the “Tennessee Three” reclaim their seats in the Tennessee House, while Republicans target our Michigan trifecta… and everything else you need to know in the states
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, August 6th, 2023 | | |
---
| | | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdI5ZwbzBAeUtytHhiFeaNg64fmHNpfVl6pENqYSsoWfdL9fiCb8MZ4CIyoe5E3MNIRz62Wg5hVH94mdQGefIdjqHMn2V78YtR6eEPmahcjzEi73jfFVOZCFoNUk2wQYalm3Olv-g83UUqi7jr9AL98QnwAGwWybauVyuL0i3JqaA6SElop06mksZ2ujjNcLaVTNN9cO4MA5vKhgY8w8tyyH3cQrr4Vp1OVB7mTB-kQGfGaD7Sy99Qa1ATzA16d-QMmdibTj2Rqr_Ge3T_LoIPylHc_FMPo1hzHGVV2YtNukeL2Buo15jgTdyDA6gA5QXgSGf-mJ0zmlgyN3x3OFSvOD2woMUuBUjKfz3LwvZjAByEdDo9XLVvYPXhWy3VxR3vsNuvuVI3-9YEzSzcmCHg2u5OfriC64W93rlIJ0ZONcm4Txc7sNODGBWl3h5yPxctmcBUhVSC1DDATmLxit3eAdbE6aAQoXmX2YSBc8c98KcsmrfB_yMSeRs0VZqJvObUs/3yi/5M7Dm8mMRACE3tSHK11i-Q/h0/ZdQqgqCZpnprDbX7O6zkoYElsqqU1DuihN3FABIaJYw)

1️⃣ **_Tennessee:_ Members of the “Tennessee Three” win and defend their seats **
In Tennessee, Reps. Justin Jones and Justin J. Pearson, who gained attention after being wrongfully expelled for protesting Republicans’ inaction on gun violence,[**reclaimed their seats in the TN House →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXTEBokwJ0izHXMWrpJl2hHzxS333IMqc7puw1ONUK5eaEiAj8B1jeyF8BjUNUt7sArA7BrqmI3UlQOpDxh8oEn5gVXxUqTidxWcBvp6ycJoX_1YfIp5eVoctSrqhM-sjbSIeCpoCeY9Z3azkk17NvAyw442clxXt1YSgI66eLKP33T5ApsIRyj4ZsDI_XUSS_LUMECQOR0qDdZxbYfZbsAxPpwaa2UO2ecDBJ8DexKMqOi6v843CWNs_6l2Mi4YegiApd6btZRNuV_8-JX2UnwubEOMRBxg8oryluF4K9B-1Wz8J_Caxi0ZaDoU4bj4tC9htVgqQ7taQ5S7BEw_UIOViAG7eYvvQF7lraNusJYuFVUvoL383f7zub6Y9UPgEUnnhemR57iECkCM_HjFueQ-I4iMC5V1lOJX4qDnu20wnmMrAew_QsDLkqXKVhIPPbWMqJuBRfI3aT7UL9UEfFEovaAtzPqDUA_K7ahSlMnxDbQdPO05pCqxmW6AxVG7DHMZvJ9FD2Znlmffz68zIWWoAtC73FDafpwFID19kUHacymvk7NBxdFmOigxREHoTmJg7LC-ULWwM-QcVXaMI6I6L5nPgT_eEX80X0BKMHhzCfHqe9WKLYnio15TeXoBTGBMyWJQzwU-KI0Pi1XWhfQwpYqSuZ5rUrG3EBwKz1lEyHZAAtEIznqHvm9-s6881-A/3yi/5M7Dm8mMRACE3tSHK11i-Q/h1/G6B7Av5VGy6yqlspPMVVvkFPUI6hetJEH8unorKn3qQ)
2️⃣ **_Michigan:_ GOP state legislators outraise Democrats **
In Michigan, House and Senate Republicans outraised state Democrats. The GOP is power-fundraising [**after last year’s midterm elections gave Democrats a trifecta for the first time in _decades_ → **](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDKjcpxeGcqhSItwQi0La3SFLqa1FNP9kCkvBxm70RCgYo9CMDch6bM91twNuR11ORZcF6PHniTmLyuCxRhyvYXei6r-5fIu2p7ArLFFVFsuZSWKnBYi049SamAQ7xeT7z1txy1CAxu6TEdCErWtgqd-zYh5BPgtQExDiWgmyz2aI0lE1Cdn9PAVf0a6bHZ7o-WK7r0rOq-4QCHAe9vHk78a_c-ZpRsr4D2_ILFQUmcirY3WMXBX8DGeQY1uKP4MR533cM6wiFGiTHLkVVPBgmoqrTNZVdZsr6z-ftBprbAxQnsMXn_LqgCyESoHeKR6GjrAdJ932Xh8vaGoAy8U5grmjZcSbh6g72nfqNqm2kjQCPkljU9OiOEftr2BSIYaMXa_yf8tzLxKlmIKSdu6T_-d4kczDncK7-lMf1dHvn6nuVHKxHT6hwyuUTnTm7z1UQkLOYJS-rduIIf-coYbsJWBEM-yLpyXvsUzI5u2Z7GLq9GTEFi4S49ijOFNzqE55kU6y0y8Hv91nSL7jeM52JGrkuGv65Q1mlhJDUAon-v5aHQ8tZzfovG6yRss160mZibFwbQCFviJ3DGH9dZ-JMxLlv0-ZIx_ovffONEK99gGJoKXf9nnmnkQcbT_YmG-zazDYSlNYJvmixfCwjMqFk9_ew-cOJJIGaD1_P-bFAtR6sP1VLLPH-7piA_ajUl-t0w/3yi/5M7Dm8mMRACE3tSHK11i-Q/h2/xw3UsJksLecCQwI_aqw7TXg3kHr8BjW7VSUKjhsF-DY)
3️⃣ **_Trump Alert:_ Former President Trump indicted for the third time**
Trump has been indicted by a special grand jury for his role in the January 6th insurrection and his efforts to overturn the 2020 presidential election. [**But there are still hundreds of state legislators parroting his election fraud lies, threatening our democracy →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDLUwyE0MTFqQPz6QiJL_gCjRrtnxzYEcWGSwsrEyDASSuONmpbpatNN1idNLx6NKonecd9cBIL4jYEHNonRDEKoOR0hnFONCNWFr4_bI4d0UKiKZ_dWLUVHdKKGEo-JKdwZzOyfB7fQDnqnjT8Uosb_hX1Y4pPNNu2tuNT5hrVlfDH0DZ3Qh_raFg2uBn2lnRALqceIW0UJ3rMDL2PUK2H6nIgg3vaS4YKu22BnWiMk621Lxt_DNDJBjF2vGPJVmf0xeDlNSFGRscKtut3wBJ6N5-Lbk1R6Wl1Gsh5LKhtjyypFAsZpdx1sgR7sKDakAUeOXXRGW8GqQhd4uwE9ZJpalG8EH6ovCRgaG_3UQxF_UZfWfUEwkh0uIr3ojzxLUj0BHh0pUD-X5tnb5HlRIdW1a7EEjfj85ga7lty8LvvE-xPkKWsImC6-UGlboXhdoQC4GZir5v_M9Tpm3ydtvprQpXyd_tmnOsIY2g38vVNyoyNyYYdmwnZhjXrY3QBbNlP_Fe651yjBhyQa_B6_oWSXjj5J1Qgg4JWJVAETOPEyEY3Ve7Yt94gfBx-6CyAFU6SAaTYOhlWNGHBuYTx-hTd-swEgXth7biHEyftlm0GEO/3yi/5M7Dm8mMRACE3tSHK11i-Q/h3/SWBYQ6hPrL8C7oSAiS2IP6bItzSytS2bnlQNDSMiSLY)

[**Let us know which design is your favorite →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1Tam5OLouQJcuKRAOXOPGe1c1jn2ovXmRk7tZPK6spwZfBX7STq_S94OcN8Nv3AdYbSGInkdKf6fvuQiGwMvgdxCeJg7Udw5f3FUXreybUk5JipE4ygtI9Udqdz0HkkO-fbJGIrQ4iSJZCRswE2_z7BLlD74Jr9ipgmdUyE_3KPOW3h3e_to0LEvra4kAvqBmugMNTd-cX2kOOA0q_a0BEvaSTUjtOJYhm1ulKPiolaHM9w6U9gMyLwGHLlfF4yQHeU96nuMiPwcR9_g55yUBpUu8h2TsGDy_pNJhKiE8EDmukC0NdtGpnKm09zw90Dhb7xoYT9hvsjKrUK0axqzuTtZlfbCOR1dRy22KgIoCfbYXpkdDYoBZELUUNzOwYmfIr4mNUx1HSL9SVU7cCF9q3IWvSzfIjUFF3vD7adWSA2aSdr_WgJSNzRfVKU9Al5LcEfDHPL3t5KElY47BoDR_D2wIBDUncMMvHIDG6kqjK-m-OeWUU3sRt249QL2oGSgJ6pS_rA8D5LgsbNvI0_ejAlUY8QJ2C74STm4FJ3iu_NRU6a97_iON8WTd-a9w26B9hPB1kURUOXkyV0z8WHT5N9F/3yi/5M7Dm8mMRACE3tSHK11i-Q/h4/OJ27h0B9Qq39iMt95YvvsMPQ50TM4VlDSHR511IxqU8) [ ](https://actionnetwork.org/forms/choose-your-favorite-sticker-3>?link_id=5&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-extremists-attempt-to-recall-democratic-legislators-while-state-democrats-expand-abortion-access-and-everything-else-you-need-to-know-in-the-states&email_referrer=email_2009094&email_subject=members-of-the-tennessee-three-reclaim-their-seats-in-the-tennessee-house-while-republicans-target-our-michigan-trifecta-and-everything-else-you-need-to-know-in-the-states) ****

name: Emily Busch
subject: On this day in 1965
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter, On this day in 1965, President Lyndon B. Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act into law. This groundbreaking legislation sought to eradicate discriminatory voting practices and ensure that every eligible citizen could exercise their right to vote without hindrance or prejudice. This legislation was and still remains a beacon of hope for millions of Americans across the nation, and it was especially felt in Michigan. | | | [](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/u/click?_t=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_m=34dfe52fa4e24d0aaad8a5c0075ec15d&_e=x_rIKo3nBasm5LyBy09lgTVdGz7ejNYmJwqqMGlaziBsLZGe8J1jMZXfgC4qgDfn_JBheHRQyAhxYs11v1ETaENovjX1XYRIahA86Z1WCrXh8SdELrpwuS_WmMeNwAfFj3Jz6EgmbVuNBPJmiP47gDPr6ogTYqmPIOtS35pzTuNjpp_eo-HPY_4Fah-7y8zBUwCFYffouoyklqKopkMj_A%3D%3D) Peter,On this day in 1965, President Lyndon B. Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act into law. This groundbreaking legislation sought to eradicate discriminatory voting practices and ensure that every eligible citizen could exercise their right to vote without hindrance or prejudice. This legislation was and still remains a beacon of hope for millions of Americans across the nation, and it was especially felt in Michigan.Over the past six decades, the Voting Rights Act has played a pivotal role in protecting the democratic rights of countless Michiganders. It has empowered communities that were previously marginalized and silenced, allowing their voices to be heard loud and clear in the democratic process. Finally, EVERY American is able to vote.However, we still have much work left to accomplish. It is essential that we continue to build upon the progress made by the Voting Rights Act and confront any new challenges that threaten the right to vote.As we celebrate the legacy of the Voting Rights Act, I am committed to championing the values enshrined in this landmark legislation, such as protecting the right to vote and working towards a more just and equitable future for all Michiganders – and I hope you all will join me in committing yourself to these same values.– Emily PAID FOR BY EMILY BUSCH FOR CONGRESS.

---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). Don't want to receive these emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.emilyformichigan.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e92c5e294c1440b880a7ffdf88c24a48&_s=34dfe52fa4e24d0aaad8a5c0075ec15d&_t=f5hblRamuR5rjvmrOh96_s-ZnYKhFXeOzXmsi-czwi6dFPvErFGFCNmKqtXoITm7I-9XgJQAayFVdhn5L9iEyAWzkRLEIvEgWe_boz2yzms%3D)
