name: Shelby County Republican Party
subject: Fwd: Last minute election requests from Chairman Cecil
body:
> > Hello Shelby County Patriots,
>
>>
>
>> We’re just over 48 hours away from the most important election of our lifetimes being concluded.
>>
>
>> Rural Ohio loses big time if Issue 1 gets defeated! Actually, all of Ohio will suffer tremendously, even those opposing Issue 1 lose, they just don’t know it!
>>
>
>> If you're on FB, please consider making the attached picture your profile picture and/or background picture until the election is over. The big border is on purpose, so the bulk of the text shows up in the Profile circle. See my personal page or the Republican Party page to see what it look like. Many people wait until the last minute to investigate and decide. Let's make the TownHall video, slides, and 8-page letter available to as many of them as possible by making this picture our FB pictures and emailing it to our friends and family.
>>
>
>> Please send an email to that address yourself, so you can see what others will see when they send an email to it. Then tell others in your circle how to get that same information. FB will help, but other means are important too!
>>
>
>> Our regularly scheduled Shelby County Republican Party Monthly Meeting is next Monday night (Aug 14th) at 6:00 PM at Calvary United Baptist Church at 9480 County Road 25A just outside Sidney. Come join us for the public portion of the meeting if you can.
>>
>
>> Internal polling has this extremely close. Every vote you can muster matters greatly!
>>
>
>> Fight on!
>>
>
>> Soli Deo Gloria...Dan Cecil
>> (937) 206-2970
>> [cecilda.usaf@gmail.com](mailto:cecilda.usaf@gmail.com)
>>
>
>>
>

name: Tina Smith
subject: 58 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
On this day 58 years ago, President Lyndon Johnson signed the Voting Rights Act into law. |
#
Folks, 58 years ago today, President Lyndon Johnson signed the _Voting Rights Act_ into law. This law changed the landscape of American democracy, helped strike down Jim Crow laws throughout the South, and enforced the right to vote that had been constitutionally guaranteed nearly a century earlier — **a guarantee that had been perpetually undermined by decades of white supremacist violence and intimidation.** These days, the _Voting Rights Act_ is not the same as the landmark bill President Johnson signed in 1965. It has been gutted, undermined, and broken by a string of decisions made by a conservative majority on the Supreme Court. Just recently, House Republicans introduced the misleadingly titled _American Confidence in Elections Act_ , which would restrict ballot access. **Folks, the fight to protect voting rights is far from over.** We need to seize every opportunity to protect and expand voting rights for every American. We should be working to make voting easier and more accessible — not more difficult. **[In the spirit of the anniversary of the _Voting Rights Act_ of 1965 and the legacy of the activists that fought for this legislation, I’m committed to passing legislation to defend ballot access and fair district maps for years to come. Please join me in this pledge by adding your name today. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67671097/420478806/-2121510452?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_PET_AC60_20230806_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjZkN2Q1NC03MDM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RjkXo5Q0vObbkFzAMMfHdwUYYJvngph6R2MfWCvBXGc=&emci=eb1e994d-7034-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=3b6d7d54-7034-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67671098/420478807/-2121510452?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_PET_AC60_20230806_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjZkN2Q1NC03MDM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RjkXo5Q0vObbkFzAMMfHdwUYYJvngph6R2MfWCvBXGc=&emci=eb1e994d-7034-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=3b6d7d54-7034-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=6227932)

— Tina

name: Scarlett Mayoralgo, Working Families Power
subject: UPDATE: Stop Cop City
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Power (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter,
I wanted to give you an important update on our campaign to stop Cop City — a $90 million urban warfare training facility that would tear down part of the Weelaunee Forest to build a mock city where police forces can test weapons and explosives, helicopter landings, and further militarize law enforcement against communities. My name is Scarlett, and I am an organizer with Working Families Power and the Cop City Vote Coalition. I’ve called Atlanta home for nearly a decade and live less than three miles from the proposed location of Cop City. For nearly two months, our team of over 500 volunteers have worked at a breakneck speed to collect signatures. We’ve canvassed, verified voter information, and hosted parties and public safety forums. **Through our work, we’ve collected over 40,000 signatures to put Cop City on the ballot as a referendum.** Which means we only have 30,000 left to go to ensure we can get on the ballot and let Atlanta voters decide. **We also won a major legal victory** last month after a federal judge overturned a restriction on who can collect signatures and extended the deadline to qualify for the ballot. While this decision strengthens our resolve, there is still work to be done, and we need you. [**Can you sign up to phone bank potential volunteers in Atlanta who can help us collect signatures and qualify for the ballot?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGE7MhEImCy2jH4PhQMOOGTDRxer5mkndcZzc4-wpMf9yQE4u2pJyxQOeStyO_-Mp38musApSyoiWIBJ_w_r8lddnBPZTIH4G5GjxijiYkQasLgEFwf9PwgPd21yOR5lt6h2NM4ulj6ddZ_t5lw6DNv22qB9-fUUpnTtO5hrF-X0X78yebz78MZb87NGMM7JKNW3bb3RHsQUJTIGdgMbedJBJuUpp6vcN-R9Zw30IqwdTHn8bGTbIa4pOXKg-ZxiZA/3yi/uysoFmOhQEOf2am-mqqQNA/h0/U5G8pz-kbGOeGbZGasYRDtujRpaRPdlSjRIGtKQg-uw) **[Volunteer »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGE7MhEImCy2jH4PhQMOOGTDRxer5mkndcZzc4-wpMf9yQE4u2pJyxQOeStyO_-Mp38musApSyoiWIBJ_w_r8lfuHEZklRNQ0TWIzOmDnkfhMBidZm-EWtca7Kzviq3qcx9w3L6IdQkKO6rbqgwOmch897jvNlKoPzq7OBBjgpQIwpQ9TfiLBll_VPT89v9eC603Skcr8wm7a-65ongUQ1LECGUsMwnhoYqIy0EyZ3Tr7GvctCXTGIKpIooN0fmGhA/3yi/uysoFmOhQEOf2am-mqqQNA/h1/GJ7uXQi4aqSYUdNIAuqCFnN9uieRwjQm-tpb-SP2GIc)** Can’t volunteer? [**Then pitch in to help us ramp up our canvassing efforts to stop Cop City.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yd_36ZKRjbSzo9SzhE5KR5RB-dMC0pqZaY8qX-WsO5utB3ySZhKiY_a8jfr0prWl2hd-NlooKUp2OQiA0He9lph-ayi4FAIvCqqMxsLpWVkIdEpQtHfkLDNiMEz_MgzPXaOjp3rqQFazJfW4Q-PWgiWaT9CF6qs1VOLPE3zafVyWLMuBfWXinOKlt4yxYnmSI_u6NW2hQ6AMcguHcYyZMjRHvlDMR1TAWMudqMoKnpwDezUZOZh9tCpo-2Ypehm59rKn7UQmHHA3WKPi6r7CN8X6cbvIiAr33jb2an6ZScEXLc5tAlot4bk-HW5tznRyjDYv3udU0NgJI3AgS7of_A/3yi/uysoFmOhQEOf2am-mqqQNA/h2/ei1pdLW4y69ZyFqyuArVoPMt9hgNGd4qZFq5eXk5Ngw) **[Pitch in »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yd_36ZKRjbSzo9SzhE5KR5RB-dMC0pqZaY8qX-WsO5utB3ySZhKiY_a8jfr0prWl2hd-NlooKUp2OQiA0He9lpcn6cVFO8nZ77r3bgwqqBRd3Yzdhk80hoC6q9qhdLYdvqxVaOEOmP3LteBk0G-uJQAavYxrii-2LpgOCCpMgl756P2O4mmUsVcALKo7DJzt0U_7TuY_8igNM2wFv7sOV6gzR3zTZjAUB9YKfiOpb64w1s27-DxZHGshA9QlbBLqQ4ffRCrfScGjCdZxbpabd5qNVPRYqcvoR6W7EKooRtgpR0JrJEz0zSAwYQReTCXNh3AdAfeurMi-cUk29Nvfr9/3yi/uysoFmOhQEOf2am-mqqQNA/h3/nH2WNRO-8SGiFVYZ9np8FbxizoM9atnOJCkZs0uqvMg)** Cop City threatens everything I love about my city — the canopies of green, the history, and the diversity of people. Cutting down 90 acres of forest and polluting our watershed will further exacerbate the urban heat island effect — where unshaded pavement and buildings absorb and radiate heat into the surrounding area. Increased police spending will lead to a greater threat of police violence, particularly toward Black and other communities of color. The decision to build Cop City is huge, and the costs, both economic and social, will impact families for generations to come. Atlanta voters deserve to have a say, and in order to create that opportunity, we must collect the necessary amount of signatures to put Cop City on the ballot. **[Sign up to phone bank from anywhere to help us get more volunteers on the street to collect ballot signatures.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGE7MhEImCy2jH4PhQMOOGTDRxer5mkndcZzc4-wpMf9yQE4u2pJyxQOeStyO_-Mp38musApSyoiWIBJ_w_r8lc_VDQMtuIjwEwlDybhQxPBrfq-tRICIfbI99ajJg1EFMlaYB_4_pkcUmBm2LLE9IWDtxuukn9r-j9WoieJllJ29Tj-4jZFbehUW-2Px5RsE4vORM9ONGhmSY3BXRD10zGGVSH4SJq-QjaT1SfLqv-xyjHqC6xUUQclZaZZqY4Wig/3yi/uysoFmOhQEOf2am-mqqQNA/h4/OXxcc-E6lrqlN1ge594LA6Az03s4cJLMr8CIY60j9lo)** [**Or pitch in to support our work to Stop Cop City and let Atlanta decide.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yd_36ZKRjbSzo9SzhE5KR5RB-dMC0pqZaY8qX-WsO5utB3ySZhKiY_a8jfr0prWl2hd-NlooKUp2OQiA0He9lp9XxUKmDoNzZ5xCUJf6VPCp-dSj_FKro7SxzRayqq6MFdIQ5IzTgZbZ2m79jrvgIj9k2P98M7dAOmkgSpPM6LYTUZmt4SDJKy-3kDtif6GjdDzKNpbRm4dkH9PwN7Dl3j8O60owLglF9p62B6MCg5jwZsF1mujXvU2HjR_nGcNxYUD0m4bzB4cGRM-Irpi6TES7CYdWwLTjgPK9tAdPsIz81yCH8DnKMJ31K9fNQMnaAIJHdmWa_CRpWTbULI_BAc/3yi/uysoFmOhQEOf2am-mqqQNA/h5/CIQQkopvVxn0Og4CAD1-6mTBT4fo3bHdy9XLvjwEEHk) In solidarity, Scarlett Mayoralgo

clean_body: | | | Peter, I wanted to give you an important update on our campaign to stop Cop City — a $90 million urban warfare training facility that would tear down part of the Weelaunee Forest to build a mock city where police forces can test weapons and explosives, helicopter landings, and further militarize law enforcement against communities. My name is Scarlett, and I am an organizer with Working Families Power and the Cop City Vote Coalition. I’ve called Atlanta home for nearly a decade and live less than three miles from the proposed location of Cop City. For nearly two months, our team of over 500 volunteers have worked at a breakneck speed to collect signatures. We’ve canvassed, verified voter information, and hosted parties and public safety forums. Through our work, we’ve collected over 40,000 signatures to put Cop City on the ballot as a referendum. Which means we only have 30,000 left to go to ensure we can get on the ballot and let Atlanta voters decide. We also won a major legal victory last month after a federal judge overturned a restriction on who can collect signatures and extended the deadline to qualify for the ballot. While this decision strengthens our resolve, there is still work to be done, and we need you. Can’t volunteer? Cop City threatens everything I love about my city — the canopies of green, the history, and the diversity of people. Cutting down 90 acres of forest and polluting our watershed will further exacerbate the urban heat island effect — where unshaded pavement and buildings absorb and radiate heat into the surrounding area. Increased police spending will lead to a greater threat of police violence, particularly toward Black and other communities of color. The decision to build Cop City is huge, and the costs, both economic and social, will impact families for generations to come. Atlanta voters deserve to have a say, and in order to create that opportunity, we must collect the necessary amount of signatures to put Cop City on the ballot. In solidarity, Scarlett Mayoralgo Working Families Power Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. Want to learn more about Working Families Power? Help us build the movement power to win a democracy for the many — not the wealthy and powerful few. Paid for by Working Families Power (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . subject: These little-known companies are driving up prescription drug costs. Ron is fighting to stop them.

| | No American should have to make tough choices between affording their life-saving medications and putting food on the table. Unfortunately, too many families and seniors are familiar with that struggle as prescription drug costs continue to rise. Pharmaceutical companies are just one piece of this puzzle. **Pharmacy middlemen, known as Pharmacy Benefit Managers, or PBMs, play a huge role in driving up the cost of prescription medications.** Ron has always believed that these companies are too often overlooked in the conversation about bringing down the high cost of medications, which is why he's been laser-focused on holding them accountable. Thankfully, we have good news. Just a few days ago, Ron chaired a meeting of the Senate Finance Committee, where they **passed groundbreaking legislation to hold pharmacy middlemen accountable for their role in driving the high cost of prescription drugs**. **Originally created to help insurers contain drug spending, PBMs have evolved into huge profit-making organizations lacking transparency and regulation.** Watchdogs say they are driving up the cost of medication, with independent pharmacies and consumers bearing the brunt of it. **The consequences of this out-of-whack market are felt by taxpayers and American families every time they pick up a prescription at the pharmacy counter.** _It's time for a change, and Ron is leading the charge._ He's been sounding the alarm on these profit-grabbing schemes for years, and has continued to reach across the aisle to work on comprehensive legislation to help put a stop to these schemes and lower prescription drug costs for all Americans. Because **everyone deserves access to the medication they need, at a price they can afford.** One thing is certain: Ron is going to continue fighting as hard as he can to lower costs for American families and seniors, and this is a huge step in the right direction. _Team Wyden_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

name: Election Alerts
subject: Trump removed from ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
After President Trump’s indictment last night, spineless “Republicans” running for President twisted the knife they already stuck in President Trump’s back.
| [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=fcb85b636e104bf99e76a8398afd93bd&_t=lKItUokZxHcuRG6KMSUFosbtJkPQzDcehfGcpBiPYg0jZGVc17piS4qXXxRjTyV8AGDgT43HMz1CrCW6qs-brwfMnarF0PsCNN1bUOtzkAs%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=fcb85b636e104bf99e76a8398afd93bd&_t=lKItUokZxHcuRG6KMSUFosbtJkPQzDcehfGcpBiPYg0jZGVc17piS4qXXxRjTyV8AGDgT43HMz1CrCW6qs-brwfMnarF0PsCNN1bUOtzkAs%3D)

| President Trump removed from the ballot?
After President Trump’s indictment, spineless “Republicans” running for President twisted the knife they already stuck in President Trump’s back.
_**They’re calling on him to drop out of the race.**_
_**They’re siding with the FBI and saying he should never be President.**_
_**They want him locked away forever, because with Trump out of the way, they think they can seize power.**_
These “Republicans” are out of control.

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

Thank you, Tell It Like It Is PAC | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America. | [PAID FOR BY TELL IT LIKE IT IS PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: Peter, will you help us win one of the most important races of 2024?
body:
We can take this House seat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15e45a6f-0202-43c5-bfa7-441ba4171551/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/T402aa13b-e960-487f-96b4-d413c8821bc3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hey, it’s Al Franken. [I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Blue Amp Action and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T027b0c46-6d24-44e4-89b8-fc7a663e7ff0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too! Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence. In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law. Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations. [Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T476ac7a9-8aef-4b3e-b67d-b9706320b452/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e253567-0bf9-44d6-80a4-53c7572b1cc3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them. Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know. And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation. [So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb08352c1-b896-4a7e-87a7-aa06fbe2bfda/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is important to me. And to our nation. Thanks, Al [P.S. I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. It’s a cheap tactic but for some reason it works! DONATE HERE.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91e95218-b054-4253-b803-f474d0b9805d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

---
Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race:
1. **We need candidates like Will in Congress.** As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department.
2. **Retaking the House runs through CA-41.** After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress.
3. **GOP super PACs.** Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “overperforming” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat!
4. **Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go.** Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage.

The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support.

[**Please split a $3 contribution between Will Rollins’ campaign for Congress and Mark Takano today. name: Team Shapiro
subject: elections have consequences
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Hey Derek – **elections have consequences.** And here in Pennsylvania, it couldn’t be more clear. Since day one, Josh Shapiro has put hard-working Pennsylvania families first by **fighting to raise the minimum wage, protect reproductive choice from extremists, and rebuild our state’s infrastructure.** But in Washington, partisan games and D.C. dysfunction are clearly getting in the way of progress –**leaving it up to the states to protect our freedoms, our rights, and our democracy.** _That’s why we need to support Democratic governors like Josh more than ever before._ [_**Josh Shapiro is working every single day to deliver meaningful results for Pennsylvania families – but he can’t do it without you. Let us explain why your donation matters so much to us, and to Gretchen.
* One $5 donation gives our team the resources we need to invest in digital ads and organizing, reaching voters in the early stages of this election cycle.

* When someone donates $5 alongside you, that doubles our ability to spread our message so we can help elect change-makers like Gretchen.

* If everyone reading this email pitched in $5, we could lay the groundwork for a strong movement that would prepare to reclaim the House majority and defend the Senate in 2024. We could make significant progress on reproductive freedom, voting rights, and other high-impact issues.

We won’t sugarcoat it — we have a competitive election cycle ahead of us. MAGA extremists are dead set on undermining our progress. But we’ve seen what this team is capable of, and working together, we know we can take on whatever barriers the GOP puts in our way — $5 at a time.

clean_body: Ohio is the next battleground in the fight for abortion rights. | | = Hey Peter, In two days, Ohioans will go to the ballot box to vote on “Issue 1.” What’s Issue 1? Simply put, Issue 1 is a ballot measure that, if passed, will make it much harder for abortion rights activists to put the right to reproductive healthcare in the Ohio state constitution. The GOP is done playing fair. They know they can’t win on the issue of abortion, so they try to stop the people’s voice from being heard. But Democrats in rural Ohio are stepping up to help turn the tide and preserve every American’s right to choose. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = Ohio is the next battleground for abortion rights. We need folks like you who are willing to stand with our movement to preserve a woman’s right to choose. = United Rural Dems | United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue? = = PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Friend,
We have a 50-point lead in the Republican primary.
We’re outraising the entire field. We have more support from the grassroots than anyone else – and it’s not even close.
My primary opponents call me the “frontrunner.”
I’m the only Republican beating Crooked Joe in the MUST-WIN states in the Midwest. The other candidates are losing by double digits.
Some of the qualified candidates are only at _1%_ in the polls.
And right now, I’m in a battle for my freedom as Crooked Joe tries to throw me in JAIL for life as an innocent man.
_**So, I think it’s sort of foolish for me to go to the Republican debate.**_
Instead, I want to see a UNITED Republican Party that puts all of its many resources together not to attack _me_ , but to attack our common enemy – the corrupt puppet in the White House who is destroying America.
**At my recent rally in Erie, Pennsylvania, I polled the crowd on whether I should attend the Republican debate...**
_But now I want to hear from everyone else. So, I’m asking all of my grassroots supporters like you to take my poll on whether I should debate in the Republican primary or whether I should let all the many other candidates attack each other on TV while I focus on the real mission of firing Crooked Joe and winning back the White House._
So, what do you think?

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c5de80349de8446d9f6230fd2ac3e56e&_e=IPe1j1nKBGtUcl0CWh6ptG288FcZyDsMaVhLSQCRtVRjOB3I4q7hwPUSWqhc_1ecUI5Oy_Lq6wmeXhOgsEmI5tHBvw_ofFccSjrJr65HtU3C-Mdgv1zPyF-Z6zzglLu5l3MqZVoz_gCfT39a6pVaT6_zXWpyY_U1Ef-MwNroXDciZl64dPi4j8TA-Qr3vSKE41qbAd7kJ7RtyOgDRB1qqmsPwj1tnEx5TsUDZIvzRNG6H9YxwWlDYlMc4Z7p52tKNvzR3j904sTmoCNWeBrkFQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c5de80349de8446d9f6230fd2ac3e56e&_e=IPe1j1nKBGtUcl0CWh6ptG288FcZyDsMaVhLSQCRtVRjOB3I4q7hwPUSWqhc_1ecUI5Oy_Lq6wmeXhOgsEmI5tHBvw_ofFccSjrJr65HtU3C-Mdgv1zPyF-Z6zzglLu5hl7hH-aNAEaKuHygO0Ku49Db1E4icnFci9kXwHDJEM5BvRP61DnRwRBxX9sojylLlGf98hUI0OpIqqQPQRea9vrSD5h5-QWUoWlk2hVrrGlx3ERvDXHBRh_cHijd6hz7HOihE25YdfA9TfB4FSoGVw%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c5de80349de8446d9f6230fd2ac3e56e&_e=IPe1j1nKBGtUcl0CWh6ptG288FcZyDsMaVhLSQCRtVRjOB3I4q7hwPUSWqhc_1ecUI5Oy_Lq6wmeXhOgsEmI5tHBvw_ofFccSjrJr65HtU3C-Mdgv1zPyF-Z6zzglLu5XWnsfRr16khzmiD5whIYZQoSVMMYyBGYelM3mtLYbYLAakdRRQhITazktZ11s1fQSHmrKEU83zaK5idDu6xyW1SwMegj-CyUQAMgo0nia0vaMVRBfnnpnLybQKBzhmCwKhNr5xZpZGCSsXp3jqsDcw%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. | For months, a growing team of people has been building a statewide, structured organization to help grassroots, tax-paying, God-fearing, hard-working Ohioans take back control of the Ohio Republican Party using "The Precinct Strategy". This a call for leaders, team members, and most importantly CANDIDATES (to run for all 88 Ohio County GOP Central Committees).

If you're considering running as a candidate, the Precinct Strategy team will help you, educate you, and guide you every step of the way, from registering with your Board of Election to gain "ballot access", to campaigning, to suggestions & brain-storming on what to do once you're elected. _**YOU WILL NOT BE ON YOUR OWN!**_

_**This is TIME SENSITIVE. You must register to run by the middle of December!**_

If you are interested in learning more, or participating in your county, please go to the [Ohio Precinct Strategy and be sure to register](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2e63a2067e&e=5c740fa3e2 "Ohio Precinct Strategy"), or send an email to **[GFIOhio@proton.me](mailto:GFIOhio@proton.me?subject=Ohio%20Liberator%20Caucus).**

clean_body: Issue 1 "Last Call" for Voting! | | | | | | Issue 1 Special Election This Tuesday, August 8th Please vote "YES"! | If you haven't already voted, please make sure to do so between now and August 8th! For more information on Issue 1, click the image below or click . | | | | CANDIDATES NEEDED! In Every Ohio County For County GOP Central Committees | | For months, a growing team of people has been building a statewide, structured organization to help grassroots, tax-paying, God-fearing, hard-working Ohioans take back control of the Ohio Republican Party using "The Precinct Strategy". This a call for leaders, team members, and most importantly CANDIDATES (to run for all 88 Ohio County GOP Central Committees). If you're considering running as a candidate, the Precinct Strategy team will help you, educate you, and guide you every step of the way, from registering with your Board of Election to gain "ballot access", to campaigning, to suggestions & brain-storming on what to do once you're elected. YOU WILL NOT BE ON YOUR OWN! This is TIME SENSITIVE. You must register to run by the middle of December! If you are interested in learning more, or participating in your county, please go to the "Ohio Precinct Strategy", or send an email to mailto:GFIOhio@proton.me?subject=Ohio%20Liberator%20Caucus. | | | Prior Issues of This Email You May Find Valuable | | | | How Can You Help GFI? subject: The fight to protect abortion starts August 8

body:
re: Tuesday’s special election
| In just a few days, Ohio voters will head to the polls for the first of two fights to protect abortion access in Ohio.

Republicans are trying to raise the threshold for ballot measures. They know they can't outlaw abortion at the ballot box unless they change the rules – and that's exactly what they're attempting to do with Issue 1.

[**We're in the final days until the special election on August 8, and we need all hands on deck to power our movement. Before it's too late, make a donation of $5 right now. Every dollar could make a difference in a special election like this.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67686069/420500491/-2013194551?refcode=em23_230806_FW4K_fndd_gq_act_FED_TODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230806_FW4K_fndd_gq_act_FED_TODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=86e80c3f-8134-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmU4MGMzZi04MTM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Co0ixP6VSESE1-UUxIHvkRENsTHtLDtd94Gijnu9nUk=)

**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing. | | Fellow American, TRUTH. There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them: | God is real. There are two genders. Human flourishing requires fossil fuels. Reverse racism is racism. An open border is no border. Parents determine the education of their children. The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind. Capitalism lifts people up from poverty. There are three branches of the U.S. government, not four. The U.S. Constitution is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing. If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. subject: Chris Brown - Proven Conservative for Public Service Commissioner
body:
Joe Biden is on a mission to destroy the power grid of the United States. He is forcing electric power companies to dismantel natural gas power stations and replace them with unreliable and expensive solar. The next Public Service Commissioner will have an important role in protecting the electrical power supply for Mississippi. Chris Brown is the Proven Conservative who will stand up and fight for the people. Chis will not take money from the people he regulates, like his opponent Tanner Newman, or from deep pocket criminal Democrats, also like Tanner Newman.

body:
Our ability to block Gov. Youngkin’s far-right agenda and pass meaningful legislation hinges on electing strong Dems to lead the VA House. We only need to flip a few seats to retake control. | | |
---
| | **Did you see what’s happening in Virginia?** Since taking office, Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin has created barriers to the ballot box, pushed an extreme abortion ban that threatens doctors with jail time, and proposed a budget that gives the ultra-wealthy massive tax handouts. _It’s absurd!_ _But there’s good news:_ This November, we have a chance to reclaim the Virginia House, defend our Senate majority, and deny Glenn Youngkin any opportunity to jam through his extreme agenda.**The DLCC is the only Democratic party committee committed to getting it done, and our efforts are ramping up quickly. So we’re coming to you directly:** [Losing in Virginia means handing extremists the power to enact their radical vision. When you pitch in $7, your donation immediately powers our work to defeat far-right Republicans in Virginia and nationwide. **It gets worse: Glenn Youngkin is so bad, he even _refused_ to name a single policy difference with Donald Trump. **
Our ability to block Youngkin’s far-right agenda and pass meaningful progressive legislation hinges on electing strong Democrats to lead the Virginia House. We only need to flip five seats to retake control.
Your contribution today could help put Democrats over the top. Early investments right now go much further than those made in the weeks and months leading up to Election Day.
**[What do you say? disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
But when I do, it's important and I need you to read every word

| |
---
| | | Friend, this is Representative Ryan Zinke, former commander at SEAL Team 6.

I don't normally send texts like this, but I need you to read every word of this message.

During my campaign for this crucial House seat, Democrats called in all the favors from their billionaire donors to help my far-left Liberal opponent, Monica Tranel, win.

I barely survived - only thanks to support from grassroots Patriots like you was I able to win my seat & give Republicans a slim Majority in the House.

_**But now, I 've just received word that Monica Tranel is running again - and this time, Democrats are going to spend more than ever before. They named my seat one of their top targets to flip. **_

Look, Friend, I'm a battle-hardened Navy SEAL and war veteran - _**so I only ask for help when it 's absolutely necessary.**_

**[But I'll be honest, if I can't stock my warchest with support from America First patriots, I won't stand a chance against the dark money Democrat donors. That's why I'm humbly asking for your help by midnight.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=423c27e257574cb298d1c801e7eed067&_e=Y14SdjGKc5mnblyak99ICScIhhp2MTTdSZG7QUhhlFlRMu7eJGubeXPN-Jeko4VOl0EAfKJvPeyn9S2OLw8Uq9JkksRiKUgjCUBvaWrylj0E98REfEBDUZ2kyoOtDs7gZm60Hl-L_Ym0nkj1doGDIS8iyH4BqgrcCjKAq-6fGLKnGxP_qj_djepkHfujPeogb7iKtX7RbXc8FYGKuPYS7NhRjSo-rT7CzUjUS0x0rq6vhrXA5dNUkqK_EWGI0zyqpQZQ_M6CrdNguOc9kG5U05SR1Nd_NTyPkh4Ho4VcIFzDwGMGOfzUG2mbpVKYSTQfNMFnWDLnxlEXyVdQo7NEV-ejavmKjpStbiy6mqwMKnxFlOocaV-Pgv9SUj3uKM2HDzKwuyHVr0E5wFHHjQR0VA%3D%3D "But I’ll be honest, if I can’t stock my warchest with support from America First patriots, I won’t stand a chance against the dark money Democrat donors. That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help by midnight.")**

---

Democrats know my seat is the key to holding the House Majority & they'll spend ungodly amounts to crush me.

So believe me when I say this - **the future of America is on the line & what happens today will decide everything.**

I'm proud to say that I served as President Trump's Secretary of the Interior, and I have more combat experience than any other Member of Congress. However, that's simply not enough to win this race.

**[So are you willing to contribute to my campaign and help me go the distance?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=423c27e257574cb298d1c801e7eed067&_e=Y14SdjGKc5mnblyak99ICScIhhp2MTTdSZG7QUhhlFlRMu7eJGubeXPN-Jeko4VOl0EAfKJvPeyn9S2OLw8Uq9JkksRiKUgjCUBvaWrylj0E98REfEBDUZ2kyoOtDs7gZm60Hl-L_Ym0nkj1doGDIS8iyH4BqgrcCjKAq-6fGLKnGxP_qj_djepkHfujPeogb7iKtX7RbXc8FYGKuPYS7NhRjSo-rT7CzUjUS0x0rq6vhrXA5dNUkqK_EWGI0zyq2Z1tA2go2Fkd4txUxOLw41HAdLhFzazrqOANrcNlFJ1YPs7dbgUsWMu7gn3rM4SbNvul2R8JLLmGplyrdm8U4AeQMN8xUsvaRkfOVgVrHbq_FReelWksOrPerInHK1heR2BUD8TeGqEYy-qyHaQb2Q%3D%3D "So are you willing to contribute to my campaign and help me go the distance?")**

The difference between victory and defeat now lies with you, Friend

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_080623_oneyearout&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_080623_oneyearout&amount=10]
Hola Peter,
Our election for the Democratic nomination to represent Arizona’s 3rd Congressional district will take place one year from today but to get there we’re going to need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_080623_oneyearout&amount=10]
That means we only have one year to tell voters about our fight for:
- Bold action on the climate crisis
- Access to abortion and health care
- Good jobs and higher wages
- Affordable housing
- Civil rights
- Comprehensive Immigration Reform
- Representation for our community in Congress by electing the state’s first Latina Congresswoman
But to do that, we’re going to need the resources to make our voices heard. We’ll need to:
- Hire organizers to help us reach voters on the phone, on the doors, and in our community
- Open campaign offices for volunteers and voters to gather
- Create advertisements lifting up the stories of our community and letting voters know where we stand
- Host events for our supporters and listening sessions in the community
- And that’s not all!
And we can’t afford to wait until next summer to start. If there’s one thing we’ve learned watching Raquel help organize our movement over nearly 20 years, it’s that it takes time to build the kind of coalition we’ll need to win.
That’s why your donation of just $1 or more today is so important to our campaign – and will have an even greater impact now than if you wait. So can you please rush in a contribution now, and help us continue to build a bold, unapologetic progressive movement to elect our state’s first Latina member of Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_080623_oneyearout&amount=1]
DONATE $1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_080623_oneyearout&amount=1]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_080623_oneyearout&amount=10]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_080623_oneyearout&amount=100]
We have a unique opportunity here in Arizona to send a progressive fighter to Congress who has a record of winning. No other candidate can say the same, so let’s not miss this shot.
A ganar,
Team Terán
P.S. If you’re able make a recurring contribution, it would really help our team budget for the future and make sure we can execute on our campaign plan. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_080623_oneyearout&amount=10&recurring=1]

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=x_subheader]
Raquel Terán for Congress

| **BAD NEWS:**
**New Alabama voting map sends Montgomery to MAGA District**

Chip in $10 or any amount right now to split a donation between The Collective PAC and my campaign to protect Alabama’s 7th Congressional District from an extreme MAGA Republican takeover.

| [Chip in $10→](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0a6Pm3vpxDU7-oIEfeHM_9TaPadvlzol5vb_iANQELEqVpJ2myTgsmDQXEmPKjfNjodvMydvkTZ6zo0SgpIDCt1RhH5DDyBYKAzH0AjG3MkatzhMgmPrYLegC1G2owvk48MRJjdQ0C7h0R_baWIXFEZ15z4FGDytKVpIXAe_ra8FZWJEXpKfKE6z_uGGnCE4HezEEMkOzGpDcmehYie5J2ZijdL1-AykXI5nvTlYwqmrRsdavusqURQRIptTuTw4ZfjlmJ73CoSlcqFVH4SqGzjTJml5XWmlbgwxKeWLa5BcW2c_RJ3IneKs-HlneDNGRp-n2mKV80rq0ClsNjylsdET9N2oY8g2p_RxXlrmIsLlLwF1mhoZIoqqCY7Ksft45hlfpdXbJ3aqslXimKGqON_wSkXCfvlqz26p5ttS0ZI-YSySaLHHpB8rcCRCczM9uDVLd8Ft1iNJcx617iiyGPA/3yi/AtZ4ww_KQgajnstMJQW-lQ/h2/CKc9TLbIwMNkPSPiVsEEGakzgCY8EHNTkNRuO1JeytM)

I’m outraged. Our hard-won Supreme Court case siding with the _Voting Rights Act_ , siding with fairness and equity, and real representation in government is being ignored by the Republican super majority in the Alabama legislature.

Not only are the state legislature and governor advancing maps that do NOT create a second minority majority voting district in Alabama as directed, they are trying to REDUCE the number of Black voters in my home district.

The Black population in the 2nd district is only 39.93%, which is far below what is needed to ensure that Black voters have a real opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice AND pushes the Black vote as low as possible without going below 50% in my district, leaving my seat vulnerable to an extreme MAGA challenger.

[We can’t let that happen, Peter. This new map flies in the face of everything the original lawsuit intended. I cannot waste a second if I’m going to fight back at the polls in 2024. Chip in $10 here to split a donation between The Collective PAC and my campaign if you’re on my side>>> ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0a6Pm3vpxDU7-oIEfeHM_9TaPadvlzol5vb_iANQELEqVpJ2myTgsmDQXEmPKjfNjodvMydvkTZ6zo0SgpIDCt1RhH5DDyBYKAzH0AjG3MkatzhMgmPrYLegC1G2owvk48MRJjdQ0C7h0R_baWIXFEYW5c31f3xBVNwCeXE0QVm-23nbMZPm4-qrFON6TIukSrRNQWKCsHx-b1o9PijDstxYtVyePF2EJPTRHDb6lCo8B3qQHdaH21ntaeEx6-q0Ge6iSzB4IlOgyQVxxTnQtFKj8_Q_NDL_RFum5TNG1ZnzFF0hy5Ka8JiXhQXHdr6-SmjB1q-dDpbpehVV51y-NCToXkkJPiG4FcZ34hYsJAUwH0ShZSSDbonqlP5U1tZEPV9ZsV9HMo4hcDyoAXBx2zRLI59S8gSiKoI6Rg6EfdoxbDzboZy8Tc8ucNvP_CsB8FngtfUBaFmxJcGESt4843Q/3yi/AtZ4ww_KQgajnstMJQW-lQ/h3/4BYNrLvHzV5bbouybtY-RG7ugSmWinb_dY8nbsWFF1c)

In one map, they’ve moved Montgomery — a beacon of the civil rights movement and the fight to pass the _Voting Rights Act of 1965_ — to Alabama’s MAGA-controlled, Trumper Second District. It’s horrifying; it’s intentional; and it opens up the only Black-majority district — my district — to a Republican takeover.

_We cannot let this stand. That’s why I need your help right now._

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | BAD NEWS: New Alabama voting map sends Montgomery to MAGA District Chip in $10 or any amount right now to split a donation between The Collective PAC and my campaign to protect Alabama’s 7th Congressional District from an extreme MAGA Republican takeover. | I’m outraged. Our hard-won Supreme Court case siding with the Voting Rights Act , siding with fairness and equity, and real representation in government is being ignored by the Republican super majority in the Alabama legislature. Not only are the state legislature and governor advancing maps that do NOT create a second minority majority voting district in Alabama as directed, they are trying to REDUCE the number of Black voters in my home district. The Black population in the 2nd district is only 39.93%, which is far below what is needed to ensure that Black voters have a real opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice AND pushes the Black vote as low as possible without going below 50% in my district, leaving my seat vulnerable to an extreme MAGA challenger. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Terri Sewell and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | But it’s not just that they are reducing the number of Black voters in our district, it’s HOW they are doing it.... In one map, they’ve moved Montgomery — a beacon of the civil rights movement and the fight to pass the Voting Rights Act of 1965 — to Alabama’s MAGA-controlled, Trumper Second District. It’s horrifying; it’s intentional; and it opens up the only Black-majority district — my district — to a Republican takeover. We cannot let this stand. That’s why I need your help right now. For our right to vote, Terri Sewell AL-07 The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.
I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.
So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.
I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch.
I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.
The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.
So I am asking:
Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can afford between Serve America and my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in. So please. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben

name: Donna Brazile
subject: never before
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
I’m reaching out today asking you to join me in supporting the Democratic Party of Virginia. As a former chair of the DNC I’ve seen a lot, and never before have I seen the level of division and misinformation being perpetuated by our MAGA adversaries.

|
---
Derek, I’m reaching out today asking you to join me in supporting the Democratic Party of Virginia. As a former chair of the DNC I’ve seen a lot, and never before have I seen the level of division and misinformation being perpetuated by our MAGA adversaries. The ENTIRE Virginia legislature is up for grabs this November – and with a MAGA Republican as Governor the potential ramifications are scary. We have an opportunity to reset the course of history in this year’s election. We can protect reproductive freedom and voting rights. We can fully fund our schools. We can address gun violence and climate change – but only if we show up and support Democratic candidates. The DPVA is uniquely positioned to maximize efficiency of resources raised. From their digital outreach programs to candidate recruitment and training, every dollar they raise will directly impact the outcome of November’s election. [Will you please join me in supporting the DPVA by making a donation right now? name: Marshall for Congress
subject: PETITION: We need Medicare for All NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67687849/420507595/-768736414?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230805_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWFlZTA3MS04YjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k8l_FU8hO7v2Gsczb5aiq8FTAV3iy7j4m0aaJvQ8xtI=&emci=d4c247b4-d033-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=75aee071-8b34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
The United States is the world’s only industrialized nation that doesn’t guarantee its citizens access to health care. As a result millions of Americans don’t have health insurance or are underinsured.
We are one of the wealthiest nations in the world, yet millions of Americans are forced to decide between getting medical care and paying their bills. Medical debt is the leading cause of bankruptcy in the nation.
**The Medicare for All Act would finally put people over profits by providing everyone in America free, comprehensive health care coverage.**
[**The Medicare for All Act has been reintroduced in Congress. Sign the petition to tell your members of Congress that you want Medicare for All NOW!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67687850/420507596/-768736414?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230805_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWFlZTA3MS04YjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k8l_FU8hO7v2Gsczb5aiq8FTAV3iy7j4m0aaJvQ8xtI=&emci=d4c247b4-d033-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=75aee071-8b34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67687851/420507597/-768736414?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230805_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWFlZTA3MS04YjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k8l_FU8hO7v2Gsczb5aiq8FTAV3iy7j4m0aaJvQ8xtI=&emci=d4c247b4-d033-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=75aee071-8b34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
Americans should not have to fear financial ruin, ration or reduce their medications, or go without needed medical care, yet many are being pushed to their breaking point while health insurance companies continue to post profits _**in the billions!**_
Our current for-profit system doesn’t measure up to the more efficient health care systems of other industrialized nations. Despite paying more, Americans have worse health outcomes and a higher infant mortality rate than other countries that provide universal healthcare.
**We should be spending money on actual care, NOT profits for greedy insurance companies and drugmakers._The Congressional Budget Office has estimated that Medicare for All would save Americans $650 billion a year! _**
**[Guaranteeing healthcare for all as a human right would be transformative for this country. Sign ON and tell Congress it is time to work for ordinary people, not powerful corporate interests. Pass the Medicare for All Act!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67687852/420507598/-768736414?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230805_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWFlZTA3MS04YjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k8l_FU8hO7v2Gsczb5aiq8FTAV3iy7j4m0aaJvQ8xtI=&emci=d4c247b4-d033-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=75aee071-8b34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**
The time is right, and that time is NOW!
— Derek Marshall for Congress

[Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67687853/420507599/-727517715?amount=10&refcode=pl_footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWFlZTA3MS04YjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k8l_FU8hO7v2Gsczb5aiq8FTAV3iy7j4m0aaJvQ8xtI=)

clean_body: The United States is the world’s only industrialized nation that doesn’t guarantee its citizens access to health care. As a result millions of Americans don’t have health insurance or are underinsured. We are one of the wealthiest nations in the world, yet millions of Americans are forced to decide between getting medical care and paying their bills. Medical debt is the leading cause of bankruptcy in the nation. The Medicare for All Act would finally put people over profits by providing everyone in America free, comprehensive health care coverage. Americans should not have to fear financial ruin, ration or reduce their medications, or go without needed medical care, yet many are being pushed to their breaking point while health insurance companies continue to post profits in the billions! Our current for-profit system doesn’t measure up to the more efficient health care systems of other industrialized nations. Despite paying more, Americans have worse health outcomes and a higher infant mortality rate than other countries that provide universal healthcare. We should be spending money on actual care, NOT profits for greedy insurance companies and drugmakers.The Congressional Budget Office has estimated that Medicare for All would save Americans $650 billion a year! The time is right, and that time is NOW! — Derek Marshall for Congress = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 (760) 486-2416 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | |

subject: Do y'all remember "Abortion Barbie"?

body:
Republicans thought I would be embarrassed to be called out for my pro-choice views. They were wrong. |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67688033/420507882/-1667455293?sourceid=1051623&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmFlZTA3MS04YjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1oJtZ67njhhH0rsTXHfcM9b7y7WjtK1k8A27Xq0fz_A=&emci=7d79a559-7131-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=76aee071-8b34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Hey Peter, it's Wendy Davis.

Barbie has been in the news lately, so I wanted to reach out. When I ran for Texas governor in 2014, Greg Abbott and his right-wing defenders nicknamed me "Abortion Barbie" — _and I'll never let them forget it_. That nickname was purposefully inflammatory and out of touch — and Republicans thought I would be embarrassed to be called out for my pro-choice views. _They were wrong_. **Let's not forget that back when I was running for Texas governor, kids playing with Barbies had more reproductive rights than they do right now as adults.**

If the GOP had their way, women would be just like Barbie: plastic, idealized stereotypes with a superficial place in a male-dominated world. _**That's why I'm asking you to donate to EMILYs List today**_. **[We need to elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot who can protect abortion rights. EMILYs List is the team that can help make it happen. Can you make a donation of any amount to EMILYs List today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67688042/420507890/-1667455293?sourceid=1051623&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmFlZTA3MS04YjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1oJtZ67njhhH0rsTXHfcM9b7y7WjtK1k8A27Xq0fz_A=&emci=7d79a559-7131-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=76aee071-8b34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** | [DONATE »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67688044/420507893/-1667455293?sourceid=1051623&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmFlZTA3MS04YjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1oJtZ67njhhH0rsTXHfcM9b7y7WjtK1k8A27Xq0fz_A=&emci=7d79a559-7131-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=76aee071-8b34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

Pot, meet kettle. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _

Friend, a new act just dropped at the MAGA Circus: The Grand Delusionist. Despite receiving his _third_ indictment of the year earlier this week, it seems the only thing our twice-impeached former president wants to talk about is impeaching President Biden — and he’s putting the pressure on Republicans to take up the fight. | [CLEAR OUT THE CIRCUS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67688438/420509640/-1218854374?&refcode=E3638-20230806-ImpeachInquiry-SB-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzBmMWRmNi04ZDM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WRRUytYnu9wTlj996om9H77e92gAkQn7u-_7F8E9VO8=)

**_Deflect, distract, disavow._** It’s the same tired strategy Trump and his cronies have employed since 2016 to sow distrust in our democracy. Only this time, not even his puppets are sure they want to play the part.
One minute, Kevin McCarthy is echoing Trump’s call for impeachment — now, he’s dragging his feet on actually launching an investigation. **They’re selling so much B.S. that at this point, even Republicans can’t tell the difference between glitter and gold.**
**Give us a break. body:
It’s hard to explain what it feels like to turn on the TV or get on social media and see Lauren Boebert attacking your dad with lie after lie.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67688483/420509830/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGRiMTgyMy04ZTM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZNRb61Ac1TVh6QfzuEXCL_JzObJP9N6Uxt80YtpnMho=&emci=334eb685-8d34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=6ddb1823-8e34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)

Hello,
It’s hard to explain what it feels like to turn on the TV or get on social media and see Lauren Boebert attacking your dad with lie after lie.
Before Dad decided to run against Boebert in 2022, my parents tried to warn my sister and me what would happen. It’s one thing to imagine what it’ll feel like; it’s another to experience it. Especially when the attacks got really, really nasty.
My dad, Adam Frisch, barely lost last year to Lauren Boebert. It was just 546 votes. I really thought he might pull it off when things went to a recount. But unfortunately, we lost in the closest race in the country.
Now, Dad’s running again – and I _know_ he’s going to win in 2024. But the attacks from Boebert and her allies have already started...
His campaign has set a goal of raising another $20,000 before midnight tonight, and I wanted to send an email to see if you could chip in to help Dad defeat Lauren Boebert.
[**It means a lot to our entire family that people like you have got his back. So if you can, make a donation now to my dad Adam Frisch’s campaign and help defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67688485/420509832/1610638071?refcode=em20230806pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=6ddb1823-8e34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGRiMTgyMy04ZTM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZNRb61Ac1TVh6QfzuEXCL_JzObJP9N6Uxt80YtpnMho=)

Hello, It’s hard to explain what it feels like to turn on the TV or get on social media and see Lauren Boebert attacking your dad with lie after lie. Before Dad decided to run against Boebert in 2022, my parents tried to warn my sister and me what would happen. It’s one thing to imagine what it’ll feel like; it’s another to experience it. Especially when the attacks got really, really nasty. My dad, Adam Frisch, barely lost last year to Lauren Boebert. It was just 546 votes. I really thought he might pull it off when things went to a recount. But unfortunately, we lost in the closest race in the country. Now, Dad’s running again – and I know he’s going to win in 2024. But the attacks from Boebert and her allies have already started... His campaign has set a goal of raising another $20,000 before midnight tonight, and I wanted to send an email to see if you could chip in to help Dad defeat Lauren Boebert. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Dad and I have already started driving our pickup truck around the district again to meet with voters. He cares so much about our state and our district. I know he’ll be an incredible congressman. Thanks, Felix ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. As you can imagine, she’s disgusted to see Democrats now want to turn America -- the country that gave her parents the chance at freedom -- into a socialist nightmare. (That's exactly what Tate Reeves wants!) ✅ Good news: With your help, we can bridge the gap and mobilize every voter in the Magnolia State before Primary Day. = In these final days before Primary Day, think about the future you want for Mississippi. Do you want a future without corruption, where Mississippians come first? A future where politicians are held accountable and everyone has access to good-paying jobs and healthcare? subject: I grew up right next to a Trump golf course
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67688894/420512762/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWEwNmVkMy05MzM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mvFOdmndgxeg79hWI8zYWdl35Lktym8alkLDHoWvmds=)

Peter, I grew up across the street from one of Donald Trump's golf courses in New York. This one, in fact: ↘↘ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67688896/420512764/-717493931?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230806_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWEwNmVkMy05MzM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mvFOdmndgxeg79hWI8zYWdl35Lktym8alkLDHoWvmds=) Yes, really. But it was not the way I think you're picturing it in your mind — let me explain.

I didn't live in a skyrise apartment or a mansion with luxuries at my fingertips.

**I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump's Golf Course in The Bronx.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67688898/420512766/-717493931?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230806_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWEwNmVkMy05MzM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mvFOdmndgxeg79hWI8zYWdl35Lktym8alkLDHoWvmds=) My mom was a single mom, working multiple jobs to keep food on the table. I'm so grateful for how much she sacrificed to provide for our family.

Living across from Trump's Golf Course, I had to see a reminder every day of how easily and often our government supports and enables the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families.

You see, the New York City government shoveled over _$100 million in government aid_ to develop this golf course with Donald Trump and the corrupt Trump Organization. _They did this while New York families like mine lived in hunger and poverty across the street._

But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: **Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families.**

When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it.

I hope you feel like you have a better sense of who I am and what my values are. I swear that I'm fighting for those values every day in Congress.

Right now, the shadow of Trump and his MAGA cult looms large. They're determined to strip our right to vote, give tax breaks to people like Trump, and put special interests ahead of working families _– and they’re raising millions to pull it off._

But we have something they don’t, Peter: A powerful grassroots movement made up of working people, not faceless corporations. [**Can I count on you to join our coalition today by chipping in $3 toward our $15,000 August goal? If thousands of people like you each chip in what they can afford, I know we can take on their dark money and reclaim our House Majority. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67688899/420512768/-717493931?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230806_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWEwNmVkMy05MzM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mvFOdmndgxeg79hWI8zYWdl35Lktym8alkLDHoWvmds=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67688907/420512777/-717493931?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20230806_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWEwNmVkMy05MzM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mvFOdmndgxeg79hWI8zYWdl35Lktym8alkLDHoWvmds=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.
