name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7246ecec9f7944fcb944901a5c398fe2&_e=yeQ4GWmJq0HdtEtNjEZq70ITvUjvqG7OZw2zIvaVmTsIwy0jLayKbfRreMxmf4Z7FmLSVv9vw33AB3eOP60fmU5D9RbxBTiz2XW12OxDpqUp6giwZrm3mKgTF5N5mteYYJ0nZZqYt5suzK64i-BQDgl4EsjMAURsIHkgLs1sp8yXDFWUsZCZBXvoBkZE-lEssguA4J1VVJQJY13rnXbxqJ4gYu9oKasLPNydGNh1uw5qLnCU3-dXdl3squzuq_TPK-ASZqd8Be__GFkrQJ6zrqQKu-kf3ap-nEFiDdQYWY5VEeiilTU-YTYQIbvjpiOcDa5myniIROYOOhvZiqfQu_SHUqbpUE6t5KTNBesmCe3YooJUbvxIphjxjoGd0k7Hjc0-9M6LXo7_44tpXQJRRPdD6SyxYtH_P0F99Tl3YXs%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7246ecec9f7944fcb944901a5c398fe2&_e=yeQ4GWmJq0HdtEtNjEZq70ITvUjvqG7OZw2zIvaVmTsIwy0jLayKbfRreMxmf4Z7FmLSVv9vw33AB3eOP60fmU5D9RbxBTiz2XW12OxDpqUp6giwZrm3mKgTF5N5mteYYJ0nZZqYt5suzK64i-BQDgl4EsjMAURsIHkgLs1sp8yXDFWUsZCZBXvoBkZE-lEssguA4J1VVJQJY13rnXbxqJ4gYu9oKasLPNydGNh1uw5qLnCU3-dXdl3squzuq_TPK-ASZqd8Be__GFkrQJ6zrvyFxowR4VRyO3ImQit_oXslHFqZDbOwhCqmXUqn88DoQpUUBDebfE9aXbClva8ElBjjK7ON1Meu5KJ3ugIR396iSB4mOph8rmIrpfsQFRMAbck9-pebS0gcR3pKwipkuKO0vGL4_RtG2VaHMwJBouc%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7246ecec9f7944fcb944901a5c398fe2&_e=yeQ4GWmJq0HdtEtNjEZq70ITvUjvqG7OZw2zIvaVmTsIwy0jLayKbfRreMxmf4Z7FmLSVv9vw33AB3eOP60fmU5D9RbxBTiz2XW12OxDpqUp6giwZrm3mKgTF5N5mteYYJ0nZZqYt5suzK64i-BQDgl4EsjMAURsIHkgLs1sp8yXDFWUsZCZBXvoBkZE-lEssguA4J1VVJQJY13rnXbxqJ4gYu9oKasLPNydGNh1uw5qLnCU3-dXdl3squzuq_TPK-ASZqd8Be__GFkrQJ6zrhJaKU2bdZ7InsZVw8zPM9YkwVHBs5DFQjKgsLP1ZAxNDsqgLyHcgbHAu4MhwvYRRrUFO9glpCEWzFCdb6TblXCrmeuGR_rGbj3QeMeH5WWUrBn0PoO8sz54QPK3caLee3-P942jRKc3-uGRBh8ldp8%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7246ecec9f7944fcb944901a5c398fe2&_e=yeQ4GWmJq0HdtEtNjEZq70ITvUjvqG7OZw2zIvaVmTsIwy0jLayKbfRreMxmf4Z7FmLSVv9vw33AB3eOP60fmU5D9RbxBTiz2XW12OxDpqUp6giwZrm3mKgTF5N5mteYYJ0nZZqYt5suzK64i-BQDgl4EsjMAURsIHkgLs1sp8yXDFWUsZCZBXvoBkZE-lEssguA4J1VVJQJY13rnXbxqJ4gYu9oKasLPNydGNh1uw5qLnCU3-dXdl3squzuq_TPK-ASZqd8Be__GFkrQJ6zrtkS8QKUaxnr_AnToEBJlQfeOk8YeRwJg3Gox_REAjBfjJqXcsMC24FZzzT6pJ0Sm_r6_bXjjLlbBMgIjcw9FdvTi5-xxSKUtMtkVubJF4NY52TonsJjsm48t4eghd8fqNlQhoRJjEjbtcT8ar-emOM%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

clean_body: After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. name: Katie Hill
subject: We’re building a lasting movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67689276/420515324/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230806_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYwMDk2MDktOTYzNC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xi0BUI8KVDW3XoN_i73tgQX6KyJKhsd1kt_rz90wMAw=)
---
I promised to always be honest with you, Peter, so here it is: Our fundraising has taken a significant dip since the election last year. _(Spoiler alert, we’re going to be asking you to chip in at the end of this email. If you want to cut to the chase,_[_**_you can do so right here._**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67689277/420515325/-529510226?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230806_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYwMDk2MDktOTYzNC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xi0BUI8KVDW3XoN_i73tgQX6KyJKhsd1kt_rz90wMAw=)_)_ The thing is, we saw this coming. It’s the “off year.” Folks check out of politics for a bit. But the fact is, there is no off season for us. We work 24/7, year-round, in order to secure wins for our endorsed candidates and our legislative priorities. We left everything on the field last year, and because of that we were able to re-elect 15 of our 16 frontline Congresswomen. That means we’re starting a bit behind this time around. 2024 is going to be a critical election, and when our supporters check out, it means we have fewer resources to get the job done. That’s why I’m asking you to step up and become a monthly donor today. Knowing we have your $3 or $10 coming in the door every month will help us plan a long term strategy, and get us through the months when fundraising slows down. I did some math — if you commit to chipping in $3 a month every month until Election Day, that adds up to just about $50. So instead of making a $50 donation in September or October 2024, when it’s too late to have a real impact, commit to making an early and consistent investment in our year round work. That’s how we’ll build a lasting and sustainable movement for the long haul. clean_body: | = I promised to always be honest with you, Peter, so here it is: Our fundraising has taken a significant dip since the election last year. (Spoiler alert, we’re going to be asking you to chip in at the end of this email. If you want to cut to the chase,=) The thing is, we saw this coming. It’s the “off year.” Folks check out of politics for a bit. But the fact is, there is no off season for us. We work 24/7, year-round, in order to secure wins for our endorsed candidates and our legislative priorities. We left everything on the field last year, and because of that we were able to re-elect 15 of our 16 frontline Congresswomen. That means we’re starting a bit behind this time around. 2024 is going to be a critical election, and when our supporters check out, it means we have fewer resources to get the job done. That’s why I’m asking you to step up and become a monthly donor today. Knowing we have your $3 or $10 coming in the door every month will help us plan a long term strategy, and get us through the months when fundraising slows down. I did some math — if you commit to chipping in $3 a month every month until Election Day, that adds up to just about $50. So instead of making a $50 donation in September or October 2024, when it’s too late to have a real impact, commit to making an early and consistent investment in our year round work. That’s how we’ll build a lasting and sustainable movement for the long haul. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your monthly donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Katie P.S. I understand that not everyone can commit to a monthly gift right now. That’s absolutely okay! name: Fair Fight
subject: How Republicans have unraveled the Voting Rights Act, and what that looks like today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
As you read this, Georgia’s Secretary of State is working to purge over 191,000 voters from the rolls. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67689267/420515313/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230806_f_voterpurge3_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjhmNGQwMi05NjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CSBqJWouhwy-5k81lJmgmwu9qQgjfao7hprHttwTFa8=&emci=498f4d02-9634-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=568f4d02-9634-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | As we recognize the Voting Rights Act being signed 58 years ago today, Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is trying to purge 191,000 voters from the rolls. Read our note below on today’s historic anniversary, and [**_if you’re able, please donate $20 or anything you can to ensure GA voters can maintain their registrations >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67689269/420515315/309034870?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230806_f_voterpurge3_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjhmNGQwMi05NjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CSBqJWouhwy-5k81lJmgmwu9qQgjfao7hprHttwTFa8=)
* * *
Today marks 58 years since the signing of the Voting Rights Act. The 1965 Voting Rights Act was a hard-fought victory owed to years of tireless activism and unyielding bravery by Civil Rights leaders determined to put an end to Jim Crow voter suppression and the centuries-long disenfranchisement of Black voters in the United States. Its passage ensured that our nation’s democracy improved, and led to a significant increase in Black voter registration and political representation, including over 250,000 new registrations by the end of 1965. The VRA permanently altered the course of history and gave a voice to millions of Americans after generations of being silenced. But over the past decade, anti-democracy politicians at all levels of government have worked to dismantle the VRA’s protections. We’ll give you the brief version:
* In **2013,** the Supreme Court’s _Shelby County v. Holder_ decision gutted one of the most crucial provisions of the VRA, which required states and localities with a history of voting discrimination to get pre-approval for changes to their voting process. This ruling paved the way for stricter voter ID laws, more polling place closures, and increased proof of citizenship requirements.
* In**2021,** another notable Supreme Court decision upheld Arizona anti-voter restrictions and created new barriers to prevent lawsuits brought against racially-discriminatory voting laws.
* Meanwhile, Congressional bills that would fix the Supreme Court’s damage and protect voting rights at the federal level — the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act — have not passed due to continued Congressional obstruction on filibuster reform.
* In **2021** and **2022,** over 500 voter suppression bills were introduced in states across the country — and **2023** has seen a near-record number of restrictive voting bills so far.

This influx of voter suppression laws in the past decade includes several mass voter purges in Georgia. **In fact, as you read this, Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is working to purge over 191,000 "inactive" voters from the rolls — disproportionately impacting voters of color.** To help voters get back on the rolls before the August 13 deadline, Fair Fight has launched calling, texting, and social media outreach efforts to ensure voters have the information they need to maintain their registrations. We also launched a special Prevent the Purge Fund to keep our efforts going strong ahead of the deadline. [**_So, in honor of the VRA anniversary, will you please rush a contribution of $20 or anything you can to Fair Fight’s Prevent the Purge fund to ensure we can mitigate the damage of this purge by the August 13 deadline?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67689270/420515316/309034870?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230806_f_voterpurge3_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjhmNGQwMi05NjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CSBqJWouhwy-5k81lJmgmwu9qQgjfao7hprHttwTFa8=) | [DONATE TO PREVENT THE PURGE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67689271/420515317/309034870?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230806_f_voterpurge3_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjhmNGQwMi05NjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CSBqJWouhwy-5k81lJmgmwu9qQgjfao7hprHttwTFa8=)

Thank you,
The Fair Fight Team

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230806_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_dianemorganourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1008&akid=4525%2E5885482%2EBRizQt

UNTIL POLLS CLOSE IN OHIO!
RUSH $10 NOW >> (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230806_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_dianemorganourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1009&akid=4525%2E5885482%2EBRizQt)

Peter Willis,

Diane Morgan here, National Mobilization Coordinator for Our Revolution. I’m writing to you from my home state of Ohio — where we have 48 hours to win a crucial fight against anti-abortion extremists. Will you rush a contribution of 10 right now so we can mobilize our supporters and defeat this right-wing attack? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230806_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_dianemorganourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1010&akid=4525%2E5885482%2EBRizQt)

FIGHT BACK >> (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230806_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_dianemorganourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1011&akid=4525%2E5885482%2EBRizQt)

Right now in Ohio, anti-abortion politicians and their billionaire backers are trying to change the state constitution in order to block a November ballot measure to protect abortion rights — and the mainstream media isn’t paying any attention.

The vast majority of my fellow Ohioans oppose our state’s draconian abortion ban, but that hasn’t stopped our opponents from spending MILLIONS of taxpayer dollars to call a special election to try to change the rules.

They’ve intentionally called this special election for this Tuesday, in the dead of summer — in the hopes that nobody is paying attention, because they know that their extremist, anti-abortion views won’t win if a majority of Ohioans turn out to vote.

Now it’s up to us to make sure they don’t get away with it. We’re on the ground turning out voters, but it’s going to take a MASSIVE PUSH in these last 48 hours to win this fight. That’s why we’re counting on you to chip in $10 or more today to get us over the finish line >> (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230806_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_dianemorganourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1012&akid=4525%2E5885482%2EBRizQt)

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.
CHIP IN $10 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9545?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230806_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_dianemorganourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1013&akid=4525%2E5885482%2EBRizQt)
CHIP IN $27 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9546?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230806_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_dianemorganourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1014&akid=4525%2E5885482%2EBRizQt)
CHIP IN $50 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9547?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230806_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_dianemorganourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1015&akid=4525%2E5885482%2EBRizQt)
CHIP IN $100 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9548?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230806_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_dianemorganourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1016&akid=4525%2E5885482%2EBRizQt)
CHIP IN $250 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9549?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230806_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_dianemorganourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1017&akid=4525%2E5885482%2EBRizQt)
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230806_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_dianemorganourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1018&akid=4525%2E5885482%2EBRizQt)
Here’s the thing, Peter Willis: If these right-wing extremists win the day in Ohio, they won’t stop. They’ll report back to their billionaire donors and ask for more money to fund their new template to tear down democracy and abortion care in other states.

The buck stops here. It’s up to us to win this fight and show anti-abortion extremists across the whole country that there is unified, mobilized opposition wherever they go. Will you chip in $10 or more to stand with us in this fight today? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230806_FR_ohioabortion_0_3MO_dianemorganourrevolution_na_na_ohabortion&t=1019&akid=4525%2E5885482%2EBRizQt)

In solidarity,

Diane Morgan
Our Revolution Mobilization Coordinator

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: =?utf-8?Q?Fabi=C3=A1n=20Basabe?=
subject: I shocked the political establishment. Let's do it again!
body:
| | | | | Copy of Lavern for Fabian | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=406f93b2bd&e=84ee529f47)
---
| | | My Fellow American,
In November 2022 I shocked the entire political establishment when I flipped a seat in Miami that had belonged to the Democrats reliably for decades.
I was the first Republican to win that seat, but it was an incredibly close race. I won by just over 200 votes.
With that victory, I got to the Florida House of Representatives and went right to work.
I've voted as a constitutional conservative every chance I've gotten and that has subjected me to **MANY** attacks from those on the Left - the smear campaigns have been unprecedented.
**They can't handle the fact that a Republican won this seat and is actually voting as a conservative.**
---
[HELP FABIAN BASABE KEEP THIS SEAT RED!](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=8196d0ae05&e=84ee529f47)
| | | Here's the problem, though. My opponent is a well-funded radical Leftist from an activist group known as Equality Florida.
So far, he's raised six figures to try and get this seat back. In a state race, that's not a small deal. **[We MUST catch up and do so quickly. Can I count on your support today?](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=b007c9038b&e=84ee529f47)**
In Florida, we really don't care what you do, as long as you do not mess with children.
In Florida, we simply make sure you do not “come for our children”.
In Florida, if you do go after OUR children, YOUR problems begin.
I know it is a pretty sane and standard thought process, but it is not one that our opponents agree with.
They have made it very clear that they are coming for our children -- they want to overturn laws that we've passed to protect children and insert gender ideology and CRT right back into our classrooms.
**I'm their top target in Florida and the only way to stop the Democrats’ attacks is to make sure my campaign war chest is fully funded. I'm working hard to deliver for the people but I'm being put through one of the dirtiest smear campaigns in the history of Florida politics.**
[**_I’m humbly asking you to come to my urgent defense by giving a small donation to my campaign today. Anything you can give, even if it’s just $5 will make a TREMENDOUS impact on defending this seat against the Left’s attacks._**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=47eab8aeb7&e=84ee529f47)

---
[KEEP THIS SEAT RED: $10.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=0859b98d6f&e=84ee529f47)
[KEEP THIS SEAT RED: $25.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=7e83505dc2&e=84ee529f47)
[KEEP THIS SEAT RED: $50.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=147a9ce976&e=84ee529f47)
[KEEP THIS SEAT RED: $106.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=af5c150647&e=84ee529f47)
[KEEP THIS SEAT RED: CUSTOM AMOUNT](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=ba0e0d9ae4&e=84ee529f47)
| | These state races make a **HUGE** difference for the whole country. If Democrats are able to flip this seat back, it has big national implications.
Let's not allow the Democrats the victory. **[Chip in today. Our campaign really needs you.](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=00de2ae915&e=84ee529f47)**
---
| | In Liberty,
Fabián Basabe

---
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=3f4ae5f06c&e=84ee529f47)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=d0a5d6e084&e=84ee529f47&c=0468da636b) or [unsubscribe](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=d0a5d6e084&e=84ee529f47&c=0468da636b)

name: collecting signatures (Team VPP)
subject: STAND with Senator Warnock for Voting Rights >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
don’t sit on the sidelines here
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/warnock-voting/?source=VPP_20230806_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=9721%2E878179%2EZDa3kw) | [**10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SUPPORT SENATOR RAPHAEL WARNOCK’S BILL TO PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/warnock-voting/?source=VPP_20230806_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=9721%2E878179%2EZDa3kw)
---
We are SO LUCKY to have Senator Raphael Warnock in the Senate – _he is fighting for us every day!_

**_And he’s done it again: proposing a HISTORIC bill to protect our right to vote!_**

Warnock’s pursuit to protect our democracy couldn’t come at a better time – Republicans are chomping at the bit to silence our voices!

**[Republicans are going to do everything they can to stop this bill from passing so we need act IMMEDIATELY to show grassroots support for Senator Warnock – SIGN NOW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/warnock-voting/?source=VPP_20230806_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=9721%2E878179%2EZDa3kw)**
**10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT**
[**ADD MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/warnock-voting/?source=VPP_20230806_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=9721%2E878179%2EZDa3kw)
---
Thank you,

_Team VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9721%2E878179%2EZDa3kw). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9721%2E878179%2EZDa3kw).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9721%2E878179%2EZDa3kw) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=9721%2E878179%2EZDa3kw). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=9721%2E878179%2EZDa3kw)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=9721%2E878179%2EZDa3kw)

name: Mark Takano
subject: I was outed by my Republican opponent. Will Rollins is now running to unseat him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67689585/420516646/-454855042?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230806_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllNWI5ZTMwLTljMzQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9uKZTmfh6D5hrY6xEN9mjAahKhIR1bCT6UgqZpD_NOc=) Hi there, Peter, it's Mark Takano.

I'm reaching out to ask you to split [**$10**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67689587/420516648/-454855042?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230806_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllNWI5ZTMwLTljMzQtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9uKZTmfh6D5hrY6xEN9mjAahKhIR1bCT6UgqZpD_NOc=) between UNITEDemocrats and Will Rollins’ campaign before his next deadline hits. Before I do, I want to be vulnerable for a moment, and share a personal story about my coming out experience.

In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay by sending out bigoted, homophobic campaign mailers in our race.

This was before I'd even come out publicly.

Coming out is an extremely personal moment, so you can imagine my horror finding out I had been outed so publicly -- _and in such a hateful way._

**And you might be familiar with the person who did it -- Ken Calvert, the same Republican that Will Rollins is now running to unseat.**

Calvert blamed “the times” and claims he has since changed, but his attacks on the LGBTQ community haven’t. He voted against the Matthew Shepard hate crimes bill. He voted against gay adoption and voted to keep us out of the military.

**After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights.**

clean_body: | = Hi there, Peter, it's Mark Takano. I'm reaching out to ask you to split = between UNITEDemocrats and Will Rollins’ campaign before his next deadline hits. Before I do, I want to be vulnerable for a moment, and share a personal story about my coming out experience. In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay by sending out bigoted, homophobic campaign mailers in our race. This was before I'd even come out publicly. Coming out is an extremely personal moment, so you can imagine my horror finding out I had been outed so publicly -- and in such a hateful way. And you might be familiar with the person who did it -- Ken Calvert, the same Republican that Will Rollins is now running to unseat. Calvert blamed “the times” and claims he has since changed, but his attacks on the LGBTQ community haven’t. He voted against the Matthew Shepard hate crimes bill. He voted against gay adoption and voted to keep us out of the military. After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you, Mark | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 Please, consider making a =. I need 1,350 more responses to reach our August Priorities Survey goal
Sorry to bother you again, Peter, but it looks like I'm still missing your response to my August Priorities Survey, and I need **[_1,350 more responses_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67689948/420517941/1110601521?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1149-su-nd&refcode=jtk1149-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjQ0NTBlOC05YzM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7Nck5-XwZOV7y2i4XrZm4OtPG3_nPkxMehc30T3zlo=&emci=504231a8-7631-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=764450e8-9c34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)** to reach our goal.

Every week, it seems, the far-right invents a new way to stall our fight for progress and harm marginalized communities. From attempts to ban abortion nationwide to the latest attacks on our libraries and schools, the GOP is working around the clock to roll us back to the 1950s – and I _need_ to know which fights to prioritize.
That's why I've decided to reopen my August Priorities Survey until midnight tonight – and I'm really counting on _your_ response.
**So please, will you take 60 seconds now to respond to my August Priorities Survey? Here’s the best link to access the form: **[https://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-august-priorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67689949/420517942/1110601521?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1149-su-nd&refcode=jtk1149-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjQ0NTBlOC05YzM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7Nck5-XwZOV7y2i4XrZm4OtPG3_nPkxMehc30T3zlo=&emci=504231a8-7631-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=764450e8-9c34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
Thank you.

– Letitia James

Subject: Need your response before midnight
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67689950/420517943/-1997846888?code=jtk1149-su-nd&refcode=jtk1149-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjQ0NTBlOC05YzM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7Nck5-XwZOV7y2i4XrZm4OtPG3_nPkxMehc30T3zlo=)

Peter, I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.
I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. Throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were _directly_ affecting me and my family.
So when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed that – _no matter what_ – I would be a voice for the voiceless and speak for those who had been silenced for so long.
**I’m proud to say that I’ve kept that promise – and this Priorities Survey is a key part of keeping it to this day.**
**[So please, will you be one of the 5,000 people I need to take my August Priorities Survey before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67689951/420517944/1110601521?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1149-su-nd&refcode=jtk1149-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjQ0NTBlOC05YzM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7Nck5-XwZOV7y2i4XrZm4OtPG3_nPkxMehc30T3zlo=&emci=504231a8-7631-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=764450e8-9c34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

Peter, thanks to the valuable insight I've received from supporters like you, I've been able to prioritize the most urgent fights that have come up this year. I listened to people's top concerns and devoted myself to going toe to toe with anti-abortion extremists, taking on the gun lobby, and fighting against a record number of LGBTQ+ hate and discrimination efforts.
**But as the political climate continues to shift and GOP extremists continue to sharpen their attacks, I need your input ASAP to know where to devote my time next.**
**I'm looking for at least 5,000 fearless fighters like you to update your top priorities with my team before midnight tonight. So _please_ : [Will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with me and my team so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67689953/420517946/1110601521?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1149-su-nd&refcode=jtk1149-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjQ0NTBlOC05YzM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7Nck5-XwZOV7y2i4XrZm4OtPG3_nPkxMehc30T3zlo=&emci=504231a8-7631-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=764450e8-9c34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

Throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were directly affecting me and my family. I’m proud to say that I’ve kept that promise – and this Priorities Survey is a key part of keeping it to this day. | | August PRIORITIES SURVEY NAME: Peter EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com STATUS: INCOMPLETE Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard. | | Peter, thanks to the valuable insight I've received from supporters like you, I've been able to prioritize the most urgent fights that have come up this year. I listened to people's top concerns and devoted myself to going toe to toe with anti-abortion extremists, taking on the gun lobby, and fighting against a record number of LGBTQ+ hate and discrimination efforts. But as the political climate continues to shift and GOP extremists continue to sharpen their attacks, I need your input ASAP to know where to devote my time next. I'm looking for at least 5,000 fearless fighters like you to update your top priorities with my team before midnight tonight. So please : | | Thank you for making your voice heard. Letitia | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sign The Petition: Wolf pups are crying out in pain and begging you to be their voice
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915601?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Tiny paws wander across the forest floor. Eager pups get their first look at summer. These innocent wolves don’t notice the steel traps set by trophy hunters lurking in the trees. They don’t have time to react as the metal rips into their paws, painting the forest floor red. _**Their lives have barely begun, and now they’re in a struggle to survive.**_ This scene is common in Northern Rockies states that border Yellowstone. There are no safeguards to keep gray wolves safe from vicious trophy hunters. They’re _**KILLING OFF**_ innocent and vulnerable wolves in droves -- and using the most _**CRUEL AND INHUMANE**_ of hunting practices. The situation is dire, Friend, but there’s still hope for vulnerable wolves. Thanks to members like you, we can still make real change happen and protect wolves before it’s too late. _**But trophy hunters are _doubling down_ against protections for these precious animals.**_**We need to act now to give them a fighting chance:** [**Will you speak up for defenseless wolf pups right away by adding your name to tell President Biden that we NEED Endangered Species Act Protections for wolves before they are WIPED OUT by cruel trophy hunters? Take action now! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915602?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915603?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Wolves had begun to make a slow but promising recovery over the past six decades. Last year, three baby wolf pups were born to the only wolf pack left in Colorado. The pups were suspected to be the first wolves born in Colorado in 80 years! Protected by the state, they were a symbol of hope for repopulation efforts.
But wolves aren’t bound by state lines, meaning that the second they set their tiny paws onto Wyoming soil, _they become vulnerable to the most brutal hunting practices we’ve seen._ **Sure enough, three mangled, bloody young wolf carcasses were found across Wyoming state lines.**
Not even wolves in Yellowstone are safe from ruthless trophy hunters. The park recently **lost a record high of 25 wolves** , _**leaving only 89 behind.**_ Yet the states that border Yellowstone still have limited safeguards to keep gray wolves safe from vicious trophy hunters and their inhumane practices.
Wolves are** dynamited** in their dens while nursing their pups. Baby wolves are left **bleeding out in steel traps** and slowly **choking to death on snares** in a futile attempt to escape. Trophy hunters unleash bloodhounds on them, **tearing their flesh apart** while they yelp for help that won’t come. _**Will you answer their desperate cries for help? These innocent wolves and pups are counting on us, Friend.**_ **We need 871 more signatures by 11:59 P.M. tonight to make a strong impression.** [**Sign our urgent petition calling on life-saving ESA protections for wolves before it’s too late >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915604?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1915603?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for protecting gray wolves from brutal trophy hunters,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D251369&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)
##### Learn more:
[www.foe.org/news](http://www.foe.org/news) [www.foe.org/about-us](http://www.foe.org/about-us) [www.foeaction.org](http://www.foeaction.org)
---
##### Connect:
[](https://www.facebook.com/foe.us?fref=ts) [](https://twitter.com/foe_us) [](https://www.flickr.com/photos/foeaction/)

subject: A View from the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b7d2d103c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
What a great first week of the Indiana State Fair!

In this week's scoop, read my statement on about the state's water policies and my visits to Vanderburgh County Miss Golden Pageant, the NRA Banquet in Evansville, and Gen Con. Another week has passed and I am blessed to receive daily endorsements!

Let's connect! I'd love to hear from you and any comments, questions, or concerns you have about Indiana and my run for Governor.
EMAIL ME (https://crouchforindiana.com/connect/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b7d2d103c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Water Policy Concerns
------------------------------------------------------------
This week, I released a statement expressing concern over the state's water policies, and how they will specifically affect Wabash Valley counties, and the communities of Cicero and Madison County.

To learn more, click (https://www.wthr.com/article/news/investigations/13-investigates/indiana-spends-millions-lafayette-lebanon-pipeline-plan-wabash-river-boone-county/531-7537884e-3f88-418c-a539-5d944a3dba90?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b7d2d103c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) here (https://www.wthr.com/article/news/investigations/13-investigates/indiana-spends-millions-lafayette-lebanon-pipeline-plan-wabash-river-boone-county/531-7537884e-3f88-418c-a539-5d944a3dba90?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b7d2d103c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

** Vanderburgh County Miss Golden Pageant
------------------------------------------------------------
This week, I presented Robin Lax, an extraordinary educator and servant leader, with the Lieutenant Governor's Leadership Award. For nearly 29 years, Robin has been a beacon of inspiration as a special education teacher at Cynthia Heights.

She is also an organizer for the Miss Golden Pageant for females with special needs and actively promotes the importance of family and tradition, contributing to the success of numerous events at the Vanderburgh County Fair.

** Evansville NRA Banquet
------------------------------------------------------------
Proud to stand with those who value our constitutional rights and believe in protecting our freedoms!

** Gen Con
------------------------------------------------------------

** ICYMI: I was honored to receive the following endorsements this week...
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b7d2d103c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Coming from local government, Suzanne understands the challenges sheriffs face. Suzanne will make sure Indiana fully funds and supports law enforcement and enforces our crime laws to the fullest."
Sheriff John Plasse, Vigo County

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b7d2d103c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"I am honored to support Suzanne Crouch for Governor of Indiana. Suzanne is qualified, dependable and has always shown a great commitment to her duties in representing all residents of Indiana."
Commissioner Rob Miller, Huntington County

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b7d2d103c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"It is an honor to endorse Suzanne Crouch for Governor. It is my belief that she is the best candidate to support law enforcement."
Sheriff Bill Brooks, White County

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b7d2d103c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

** "Indiana needs an honest, strong and steady hand moving into the future. Suzanne is the embodiment of these qualities. She has my full endorsement."
------------------------------------------------------------
County Treasurer Monty Snelling, Clark County

https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b7d2d103c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

"Over the past several years, the public and I have had the opportunity to observe and evaluate the character, compassion for Hoosiers, and conservative leadership of Suzanne Crouch. Her transparent and pragmatic insight into our state's government, as well as her willingness to examine the issues and listen closely to the public's questions and concerns, sets her apart from the style of leadership other candidates have displayed.

“I wholly support Suzanne Crouch for Governor based on her qualifications, experience, and leadership from the county level to the state level. Suzanne's knowledge of governing state agencies in her current capacity as Lt. Governor has prepared her to expand and run the state, and establishes her as the candidate with the most distinguished vision for the future. I am proud to endorse Suzanne Crouch to be the first woman governor of the great state of Indiana."
GOP Chairwoman Kristi Risk, Owen County

** Get Involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
https://mcusercontent.com/db6332b918877c0167cdddb48/files/3f465566-bc26-b24a-e538-7485d8cbc339/Crouch_List_of_2023_Fundraising_Events_as_of_7.20.23.pdf?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=b7d2d103c4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) .

name: Gutierrez HQ
subject: Peter, did y’all hear?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
CNN just named Ted Cruz’s seat most likely to flip in 2024.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67690032/420518556/-575498061?refcode=BLU-RGTX-20230806-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY4NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGE0ZDQwM2MtOWYzNC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=omFEGNlTmDdJfxApV-nA10j5mKBXozihi6PKOwCoqh0=)
---

name: Annie Andrews
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Their Future PAC
body:
| | | I want to say thank you for contributing to Their Future PAC’s July fundraising goal—every dollar raised is crucial to ensuring we can continue our efforts.

There’s a lot of issues we’re focused on as an organization, because the ways in which our country is failing our kids are plentiful.

**Here’s a startling figure: The number of gun deaths among children and teens in America jumped by over 50% between 2019 and 2021 alone.**

We hear a lot about mass shootings in the media and that’s definitely an important part of this epidemic, but many of gun deaths for small children are unintentional. This means a child gains access to an unsecured firearm and unintentionally pulls the trigger, killing themselves or someone else.

More children die from unintentional firearm injuries than in mass shootings every year... _a fact we don’t talk about nearly enough._

The one thing you can do right now to keep your kids safe is to: talk to the parents of the kids they play with and to family members about the importance of secure firearm storage in the home. Yes, it’s daunting—like stepping onto a political battlefield—but these are the conversations that save lives.

[

**_Click here to read my full interview with The 19th._**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/hDSVFUOQ746wgj5ueXhy8pOrPqrFvCfGdgg52ylZbT7issujeh7aDoAUswbhaJ5Zsu--yJBoZnNda6JO3-khtv_2JF-YlyFqHXEHEqFrRDHzUqoOHvgOfT9OWDMZiScf0VSz7xNTSJdg1pjTELiJA3tCAywJ4lRjBEnKGRvePoK5Vu0j42qpn69y9qY77YrhC_hG3mff2ae1-o3PxQey9dyOAs2XxWCxNdhXZIKvg6L1sOiuvLGBZ4PBk_3vz5qPsRWQYusKq1vYrJ0QjOgLnSdz3eqSxKkYto0F_bk-4S1lA9PPCpnW-2U8_Y0-YWTqlzVfhtf-8CZxkZA-9FMveg/3yi/ZdRIzKG0QNW27AoD2kNfWA/h0/nvIJB5l6CCPo97VzAWO2ojxdNyQQ3LOnTX-WSajNV94)
Everyone who supports Their Future is contributing towards the solution, so thank you again for keeping us fueled for the fight ahead.

— Annie
_CEO and Founder, Their Future PAC

P.S. If you didn’t get the chance to contribute in July or want to double-down on your support, every donation big or small is meaningful. [**_Click here to donate._**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xwfP64QNvc5bf7rIooR2qAJoK5uN2cwvs5-w5_5EtEqZiEXoAr0BsHVdSFlYJO3Zfu9oTx2oqayQZ4nt29OVoYfChrcimUf94q3cwas059nlZwtVF_dMqcC2DKfUxT3gS1rFuMO_KdOnawwfsCSYv8E4ffThWHYzE_mQ2H1T1osVSKhcySlQve0Bt5dbMalExS_FB9TYpr9xB5l0BG5r79bckiwWCmYIWVkOYh3EUY6pt1TehT2Z_TOr2HxsCqOK4BCPiJtroocnst76IjY9s3fUE9DR0xZnxON_XX3uug_Q/3yi/ZdRIzKG0QNW27AoD2kNfWA/h1/7DzSJak7QNZSFEPCP0WSpAjKNLn-LBZAUtRdX9YVf_8)_

subject: Peter, will you help us keep up this MO-mentum?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Endorse Lucas Kunce in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race today!
#
Our movement is picking up some serious MO-mentum, Peter.
Since Lucas Kunce launched this campaign to replace Josh Hawley, he’s earned support from current + former leaders across the state like Lieutenant Governor Joe Maxwell, labor groups representing tens of thousands of workers like the Missouri AFL-CIO, and national organizations like Social Security Works PAC.
**But now, we’ve got to keep it going.**
GOP insiders and political pundits are using anything they can find to evaluate the strength of Lucas + our grassroots movement — and we need to keep proving that we’re building the people-powered campaign that can win.
**[So Peter, will you join the tens of thousands of grassroots supporters standing behind Lucas by personally endorsing his campaign today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230806_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=3514%2E614464%2EFWqmAZ)**

clean_body: we've extended our poll deadline for another 24 hours Friend, you were exclusively chosen to participate in our new 2024 Presidential Poll — but we never received your response! Even though Trump has pushed a horrific agenda, incited a deadly insurrection and been arrested for mishandling classified documents, he's STILL polling far ahead of his GOP rivals. Now that the RNC has officially set the date for the first GOP primary debate, we need to know where grassroots activists like you stand. That's why we've reopened our poll for another 24 hours to give you ONE FINAL CHANCE to make your voice heard. So please, respond before our new deadline at midnight to stand against Trump and his horrific agenda: Who will you vote for in 2024? | | | | \------- Forwarded message ------- From: White House Update Date: Thur, Aug 3, 2023 Subject: this is bad news for Dems ... | | | YOU'VE BEEN SELECTED TO REPRESENT 43614 IN A LIVE POLL. | | **NEW POLLING DATA RELEASED Friend: This is bad news for Democrats ... Since President Biden announced his reelection campaign, Trump has been slowly gaining on him in the polls. Now, the latest data shows President Biden's lead has shrunk to just 2 points — within the margin of error! With President Biden and Trump locked in a statistical tie, Democrats will only win with a massive turnout on Election Day. That's why we need to make sure that every single Democrat is ready to cast their ballots for President Biden — and you have been selected to represent 43614 in our live poll! Please, respond immediately to ensure that your response is counted: Who will you vote for in 2024? | | | | | | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

The inaction and agenda-pushing in the Hosue has to stop. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67691226/420522882/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDI4MTc3Ni1hNjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0BT1X0HqANRImMLqllOYznrBlM3pueQBONj5DB4Usis=&emci=14bc9dad-0e33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=bd281776-a634-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | It’s August, and that means Congress has all gone back to their respective districts for town halls, constituent meetings, and work in the district, but this time around, this in district work period does not feel the same because the Republican majority has not passed any salient bills to serve the American people before leaving Washington D.C. It’s the job of the party in power to lead the processes in the House, but rather than putting forth bipartisan, consensus legislation, House Republicans have pushed bills that seek to further limit healthcare access for service members, attack the LGBTQ+ community, and reverse the FDA’s rule to allow the sale of abortion medication. After all that, House Republicans cut a deal to temporarily keep the Department of Agriculture open, rather than staying in session to work through the all-important Farm Bill, which also deals with food insecurity, one of Jahana’s core issues. **The American people can’t afford this type of inaction and putting partisan politics before the needs of the people. We can’t afford another two years of Republican control of the House!** [**That’s why we must keep CT-05 blue. Experts agree that CT-05 is one of the most important races in 2024, and if we want to take back the House, we have to keep this swing district blue. I am coming to you with an urgent plea.

My team is running out of steam for our fundraising push. It does not look good for us and, if I'm being honest, **it does not look good at all.**

body:
| For his entire career, Adam has delivered results for the hardworking families in his district — and he will do the same for every Californian.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3286%2E5257348%2EAf24m0)
Derek,
Transparency will be crucial in the trials of the United States of America v. Donald Trump — which could begin in a matter of months.
If Americans from both political parties are to accept the outcome, it will be vitally important for them to witness, as directly as possible, the full facts and evidence.
**That’s why dozens of my colleagues joined me in urging that these proceedings be broadcast to the public.**
**[Sign onto my petition now if you agree these trials should be televised. We must ensure the facts of this case are brought forward, unfiltered, to the public.](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-29239896-broadcast/?t=4&akid=3286%2E5257348%2EAf24m0)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-29239896-broadcast/?t=5&akid=3286%2E5257348%2EAf24m0)
---
Given the historic national importance of these cases, the American people deserve to witness how the trials are conducted, the strength of the evidence, and the credibility of witnesses first-hand.
Thank you,
— Adam

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: The story the Oppenheimer movie didn’t tell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67692050/420526141/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230806_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjRjZWVkNi1hZjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F8_uPfimXt8hgCddePAF94wAMRfceayFA-zGmfq5m9w=&emci=9d2955df-8631-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=624ceed6-af34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
Have you seen the movie _Oppenheimer_ yet? Well, I have an important update on the story the movie didn’t tell. The film showed a remote test site in the New Mexico desert. An isolated area 210 miles south of Los Alamos, according to government accounts. Not quite the case: As many as 500,000 people lived within 150 miles of the test site — some only 12 miles away. None were warned, and none were evacuated before or after the Trinity Test, the first time a nuclear weapon had ever been detonated. **The fallout reached 46 states, and the blast was felt as far as 200 miles away. Ash fell from the sky for days.** In the Tularosa Basin, those now known as Downwinders were exposed to dangerous levels of radiation, marking them and their descendants with tragedy ever since. They developed cancers and other illnesses. Infant mortality spiked. 78 years later, they’ve still not been compensated. In 1990, the _Radiation Exposure Compensation Act (RECA)_ was passed, establishing a federal fund for people affected by radiation exposure. For reasons I can’t even begin to understand, New Mexico Downwinders were excluded. How is it possible that the communities at the center of the first nuclear test were not covered by a program designed for those harmed by nuclear tests? We finally have a chance to do the right thing. **A bill to expand _RECA_ passed the Senate** to finally give what is owed to our Downwinders. **Now, it’s on its way to the House.** **[Will you add your name to show support for expanding _RECA_? We are so close to getting this signed into law.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67692051/420526142/-1595518354?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230806_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjRjZWVkNi1hZjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F8_uPfimXt8hgCddePAF94wAMRfceayFA-zGmfq5m9w=&emci=9d2955df-8631-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=624ceed6-af34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67692052/420526143/-1595518354?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230806_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjRjZWVkNi1hZjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F8_uPfimXt8hgCddePAF94wAMRfceayFA-zGmfq5m9w=&emci=9d2955df-8631-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=624ceed6-af34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
Thank you for making your voice heard,
Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67692053/420526144/1737618405?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230806_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjRjZWVkNi1hZjM0LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F8_uPfimXt8hgCddePAF94wAMRfceayFA-zGmfq5m9w=&emci=9d2955df-8631-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=624ceed6-af34-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=252045). If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, [click here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XDS0qYRlFU-BTKcEniMrVQ2?unsubscribedata=S39wdAL3bZ2P0e5BLTx3OgitdeWK%2BM3W6qXUmDGUorwF%2Bk0cP%2FJ8m5edUxF6JMtIwoDFo4qKU82t8w6XAd%2BrUCPaBXcd%2FrAKUhUtFac0RKXrFjraPELRYDrcA1IuKArEfm6zKYyTxtdjm8BRN%2FbAaxJKZxgKPMDAEvnNc84u0Ah0xx4GhFY%2FyPaQqn1IVsgi%2BGcZHjyNGwSnWBx0q1paugJUa%2FbZMWW2Lu%2Fl882m9VwqQEOnpFOTL3Firt36k3MnoThF1tywJb4W5NVLmgTGCgrXrf35snW3ygOPkY1yocsDsjeuzCXm6lJ11U%2BqeyBjoQ17tHznibKXsLX26tYDQyZC1EQTV0GOPeX5e7xXvabuRkxCrYV%2FgDK705vvj52MYEBNdXxee%2FVf9XBHWD2MZwnRUmBRC09zfDWsvMTD1Ng%3D).

---
We’re living through unprecedented times in American history.
---
And at this pivotal moment in the 2024 election – _as the witch hunts heat up like never before_ – **_YOU_** could hold a special seat at my upcoming campaign dinner that I’m hosting this month.
---
**_I’m flying one lucky winner and a guest of your choice to Nashville to join us for dinner._**
---
All I ask is that you make a contribution of _any amount_ to peacefully defend our movement from the never-ending witch hunts, and you’ll be automatically entered to win!
---
I am only able to endure these endless attacks and witch hunts because of my grassroots supporters – so I can’t imagine having this dinner without my trusted allies like YOU.

Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. clean_body: As the witch hunts heat up like never before - - - | | | | | Friend, We’re living through unprecedented times in American history. And at this pivotal moment in the 2024 election – as the witch hunts heat up like never before – YOU could hold a special seat at my upcoming campaign dinner that I’m hosting this month. I’m flying one lucky winner and a guest of your choice to Nashville to join us for dinner. All I ask is that you make a contribution of any amount to peacefully defend our movement from the never-ending witch hunts, and you’ll be automatically entered to win! I am only able to endure these endless attacks and witch hunts because of my grassroots supporters – so I can’t imagine having this dinner without my trusted allies like YOU. | | Thank you, Donald J. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Save America JFC by clicking . Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking or by texting “AUGUSTDINNER” to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between August 2, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on August 7, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) “Prize Winner” will receive a trip for two to a August 17, 2023 dinner event in Nashville, Tennessee consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner’s residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the dinner event featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value (“ARV”) of the Prize: $5,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

body:

| _**You know**_ Democrat Sherrod Brown was just ranked the #3 most likely Senate seat to flip in the whole COUNTRY!

But even still, we FAILED to hit Friday’s urgent deadline to fight back and PROTECT critical toss-up states like Ohio. **_This can’t be happening!!_**
